bulbasaur.name: Bulbasaur
bulbasaur.description: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

ivysaur.name: Ivysaur
ivysaur.description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

venusaur.name: Venusaur
venusaur.description: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

venusaurmega.name: Venusaur-Mega
venusaurmega.description: In order to support its flower, which has grown larger due to Mega Evolution, its back and legs have become stronger.

venusaurgmax.name: Venusaur-Gmax
venusaurgmax.description: In battle, this Pokémon swings around two thick vines. If these vines slammed into a 10-story building, they could easily topple it.

charmander.name: Charmander
charmander.description: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

charmeleon.name: Charmeleon
charmeleon.description: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

charizard.name: Charizard
charizard.description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

charizardmegax.name: Charizard-Mega-X
charizardmegax.description: The overwhelming power that fills its entire body causes it to turn black and creates intense blue flames.

charizardmegay.name: Charizard-Mega-Y
charizardmegay.description: Its bond with its Trainer is the source of its power. It boasts speed and maneuverability greater than that of a jet.

charizardgmax.name: Charizard-Gmax
charizardgmax.description: The flame inside its body burns hotter than 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit. When Charizard roars, that temperature climbs even higher.

squirtle.name: Squirtle
squirtle.description: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

wartortle.name: Wartortle
wartortle.description: It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

blastoise.name: Blastoise
blastoise.description: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

blastoisemega.name: Blastoise-Mega
blastoisemega.description: The cannon on its back is as powerful as a tank gun. Its tough legs and back enable it to withstand the recoil from firing the cannon.

blastoisegmax.name: Blastoise-Gmax
blastoisegmax.description: The cannon on its back is as powerful as a tank gun. Its tough legs and back enable it to withstand the recoil from firing the cannon.

caterpie.name: Caterpie
caterpie.description: It’s easy to catch, and it grows quickly, making it one of the top recommendations for novice Pokémon Trainers.

metapod.name: Metapod
metapod.description: Its shell is hard, but it’s still just a bug shell. It’s been known to break, so intense battles with it should be avoided.

butterfree.name: Butterfree
butterfree.description: When attacked by other Pokémon, it defends itself by scattering its poisonous scales and fluttering its wings.

butterfreegmax.name: Butterfree-Gmax
butterfreegmax.description: Once it has opponents trapped in a tornado that could blow away a 10-ton truck, it finishes them off with its poisonous scales.

beedrillmega.name: Beedrill-Mega
beedrillmega.description: Its legs have become poison stingers. It stabs its prey repeatedly with the stingers on its limbs, dealing the final blow with the stinger on its rear.

pidgeotmega.name: Pidgeot-Mega
pidgeotmega.description: With its muscular strength now greatly increased, it can fly continuously for two weeks without resting.

rattata.name: Rattata
rattata.description: With their strong capacity for survival, they can live in dirty places without concern. Left unchecked, their numbers multiply rapidly.

raticate.name: Raticate
raticate.description: Its disposition is far more violent than its looks would suggest. Don’t let your hand get too close to its face, as it could bite your hand clean off.

spearow.name: Spearow
spearow.description: Farmers whose fields are troubled by bug Pokémon appreciate Spearow for its vigorous appetite and look after it.

fearow.name: Fearow
fearow.description: Drawings of a Pokémon resembling Fearow can be seen in murals from deep in ancient history.

pikachu.name: Pikachu
pikachu.description: It’s in its nature to store electricity. It feels stressed now and then if it’s unable to fully discharge the electricity.

pikachugmax.name: Pikachu-Gmax
pikachugmax.description: When it smashes its opponents with its bolt-shaped tail, it delivers a surge of electricity equivalent to a lightning strike.

raichu.name: Raichu
raichu.description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

raichumegax.name: Raichu-Mega-X
raichumegax.description: It resembles an X as it flies through the air with 50 million volts of electricity sparking from its ears and forked tail.

raichumegay.name: Raichu-Mega-Y
raichumegay.description: It fires bolts of electricity from the tip of its tail and from the spiky tufts of fur growing out of its temples. This electricity forms the letter Y.

sandshrew.name: Sandshrew
sandshrew.description: It usually makes its home in deserts and arid zones, where rain does not fall. It digs holes to catch Bug-type Pokémon.

sandslash.name: Sandslash
sandslash.description: It uses its claws to climb trees and then curls its body into a spiny ball, ready to drop onto any prey that appears.

nidoranf.name: Nidoran-F
nidoranf.description: Females are more sensitive to smells than males. While foraging, they’ll use their whiskers to check wind direction and stay downwind of predators.

nidorina.name: Nidorina
nidorina.description: The horn on its head has atrophied. It’s thought that this happens so Nidorina’s children won’t get poked while their mother is feeding them.

nidoqueen.name: Nidoqueen
nidoqueen.description: Nidoqueen is better at defense than offense. With scales like armor, this Pokémon will shield its children from any kind of attack.

nidoranm.name: Nidoran-M
nidoranm.description: The horn on a male Nidoran’s forehead contains a powerful poison. This is a very cautious Pokémon, always straining its large ears.

nidorino.name: Nidorino
nidorino.description: With a horn that’s harder than diamond, this Pokémon goes around shattering boulders as it searches for a moon stone.

nidoking.name: Nidoking
nidoking.description: When it goes on a rampage, it’s impossible to control. But in the presence of a Nidoqueen it’s lived with for a long time, Nidoking calms down.

clefairy.name: Clefairy
clefairy.description: On nights with a full moon, they gather together and dance. The surrounding area is enveloped in an abnormal magnetic field.

clefable.name: Clefable
clefable.description: According to tradition, people who see a pair of Clefable skipping by can look forward to a happy marriage.

clefablemega.name: Clefable-Mega
clefablemega.description: It flies by using the power of moonlight to control gravity within a radius of over 32 feet around it.

vulpix.name: Vulpix
vulpix.description: From its mouth spew flames that seem to resemble the spirits of the deceased. Some people mistakenly think this fire is a ghost.

ninetales.name: Ninetales
ninetales.description: Said to live for a thousand years, this Pokémon uses its supernatural abilities to manipulate fire. It can burn its prey to a crisp as it pleases.

jigglypuff.name: Jigglypuff
jigglypuff.description: Jigglypuff possess a vocal range that exceeds 12 octaves, but each individual’s singing skill depends on its own effort.

wigglytuff.name: Wigglytuff
wigglytuff.description: As it inhales, it expands...and expands...and expands. Wigglytuff compete to see which one can inflate itself the most.

zubat.name: Zubat
zubat.description: When exposed to sunlight, they suffer burns. The frequency of their ultrasonic waves can differ slightly from colony to colony.

golbat.name: Golbat
golbat.description: Sometimes they drink so much blood, they can’t fly anymore. Then they fall to the ground and become food for other Pokémon.

oddish.name: Oddish
oddish.description: If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.

gloom.name: Gloom
gloom.description: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

vileplume.name: Vileplume
vileplume.description: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

paras.name: Paras
paras.description: Mushrooms called tochukaso sprout from its back. They can be dried and powdered to make a medicine used to extend life.

parasect.name: Parasect
parasect.description: It scatters toxic spores from its mushroom cap. Once harvested, these spores can be steeped and boiled down to prepare herbal medicines.

diglett.name: Diglett
diglett.description: Many farmers cherish and nurture Diglett because its droppings enrich the soil it lives in.

dugtrio.name: Dugtrio
dugtrio.description: Despite the closeness between this Pokémon and farmers and other people, no one has ever seen the parts of it concealed underground.

meowth.name: Meowth
meowth.description: It loves shiny things. It often fights with Murkrow over prey they’re both trying to catch.

meowthgmax.name: Meowth-Gmax
meowthgmax.description: The pattern that has appeared on its giant coin is thought to be the key to unlocking the secrets of the Dynamax phenomenon.

persian.name: Persian
persian.description: It has a high opinion of itself, although not to the same extent as the Alolan Persian. It’s quite difficult to make friends with this Pokémon.

psyduck.name: Psyduck
psyduck.description: This Pokémon is troubled by constant headaches. The more pain it’s in, the more powerful its psychokinesis becomes.

golduck.name: Golduck
golduck.description: It swims along the banks of lakes and catches fish Pokémon. It takes them to the shore and quietly eats them up.

mankey.name: Mankey
mankey.description: Its raging tires it out and causes it to fall asleep, but the anger resonating in its dreams causes it to wake up—which infuriates it all over again.

primeape.name: Primeape
primeape.description: Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.

growlithe.name: Growlithe
growlithe.description: It looks cute, but when you approach another Trainer’s Growlithe, it will bark at you and bite.

arcanine.name: Arcanine
arcanine.description: The fire burning inside its body serves as the energy to fuel it as it runs great distances. It appears in many legends.

poliwag.name: Poliwag
poliwag.description: It’s still not very good at walking. Its Trainers should train this Pokémon to walk every day.

poliwhirl.name: Poliwhirl
poliwhirl.description: It marches over the land in search of bug Pokémon to eat. Then it takes them underwater so it can dine on them where it’s safe.

poliwrath.name: Poliwrath
poliwrath.description: Its percentage of body fat is nearly zero. Its body is entirely muscle, which makes it heavy and forces its swimming prowess to develop.

abra.name: Abra
abra.description: It can teleport itself to safety while it’s asleep, but when it wakes, it doesn’t know where it is, so it panics.

kadabra.name: Kadabra
kadabra.description: Kadabra’s presence infests televisions and monitors with creepy shadows that bring bad luck.

alakazam.name: Alakazam
alakazam.description: Its brain cells continue to increase in number until its death. The older the Alakazam, the larger its head.

alakazammega.name: Alakazam-Mega
alakazammega.description: Alakazam has traded away its muscles, unleashing its true power. With its psychic powers, it can foresee all things.

machop.name: Machop
machop.description: With its superhuman strength, it’s able to throw a hundred people all at the same time. Its strength comes from lifting Graveler every day.

machoke.name: Machoke
machoke.description: It willingly assists with hard labor because it knows the work is good training for its muscles.

machamp.name: Machamp
machamp.description: It can lift heavy loads with the greatest of ease. It can even heft dump trucks. But its clumsy fingers prevent it from doing any precision work.

machampgmax.name: Machamp-Gmax
machampgmax.description: The Gigantamax energy coursing through its arms makes its punches hit as hard as bomb blasts.

victreebelmega.name: Victreebel-Mega
victreebelmega.description: The volume of this Pokémon's acid has increased due to Mega Evolution, filling its mouth. If it's not careful, the acid will overflow and spill out.

tentacool.name: Tentacool
tentacool.description: It drifts in shallow seas, such as the areas near beaches. If you get bitten or stabbed by its toxic tentacles, rush to the hospital.

tentacruel.name: Tentacruel
tentacruel.description: Although these Pokémon are rare, when a large outbreak of them occurs, all fish Pokémon disappear from the surrounding sea.

geodude.name: Geodude
geodude.description: There are plenty of them to be found along any road. A scholar with too much free time once counted a hundred of them along a single route.

graveler.name: Graveler
graveler.description: This slow-footed Pokémon moves by curling up and rolling instead of walking. With enough momentum, its speed can exceed 60 mph.

golem.name: Golem
golem.description: Once a year, this Pokémon molts, and its shed shell returns to the soil. This process creates enriched soil, so farmers collect the shells.

ponyta.name: Ponyta
ponyta.description: It can’t run properly when it’s newly born. As it races around with others of its kind, its legs grow stronger.

rapidash.name: Rapidash
rapidash.description: This Pokémon can be seen galloping through fields at speeds of up to 150 mph, its fiery mane fluttering in the wind.

slowpoke.name: Slowpoke
slowpoke.description: Alolan home cooking involves drying Slowpoke tails and then simmering them into a salty stew.

slowbro.name: Slowbro
slowbro.description: Whenever Shellder bites down hard on its tail, it gives Slowbro a flash of inspiration...which it forgets a moment later.

slowbromega.name: Slowbro-Mega
slowbromega.description: When bathed in the energy of Mega Evolution, Shellder converts into impregnable armor. There is virtually no change in Slowpoke.

magnemite.name: Magnemite
magnemite.description: It sends out electromagnetic waves, which let it float through the air. Touching it while it’s eating electricity will give you a full-body shock.

magneton.name: Magneton
magneton.description: It has about three times the electrical power of Magnemite. For some reason, outbreaks of this Pokémon happen when lots of sunspots appear.

grimer.name: Grimer
grimer.description: It was born from sludge transformed by exposure to X-rays from the moon. When its internal load of germs decreases, it dies.

muk.name: Muk
muk.description: After recent environmental improvements, this Pokémon is now hardly seen at all. People speculate that it may go extinct at some point.

shellder.name: Shellder
shellder.description: This Pokémon’s tongue is always hanging out. It uses its tongue with great dexterity to dig up sand from the seabed in its search for food.

cloyster.name: Cloyster
cloyster.description: Excavation of the tombs of ancient hunting tribes has turned up many spears tipped with spikes that had fallen off this Pokémon’s shell.

gastly.name: Gastly
gastly.description: Although Gastly is barely visible, when it’s near, a faint sweet smell lingers.

haunter.name: Haunter
haunter.description: It fears the light and revels in the dark. It may be on the verge of extinction in cities that stay brightly lit at night.

gengar.name: Gengar
gengar.description: It apparently wishes for a traveling companion. Since it was once human itself, it tries to create one by taking the lives of other humans.

gengarmega.name: Gengar-Mega
gengarmega.description: It can pass through other dimensions and appear anywhere. It caused a stir one time when it stuck just one leg out of a wall.

gengargmax.name: Gengar-Gmax
gengargmax.description: It lays traps, hoping to steal the lives of those it catches. If you stand in front of its mouth, you'll hear your loved ones' voices calling out to you.

onix.name: Onix
onix.description: As it digs through the ground, it absorbs many hard objects. This is what makes its body so solid.

drowzee.name: Drowzee
drowzee.description: It finds really fun dreams tasty. When it makes friends with people, it may show them the most delicious dreams it’s ever eaten.

hypno.name: Hypno
hypno.description: As a matter of course, it makes anyone it meets fall asleep and has a taste of their dreams. Anyone having a good dream, it carries off.

krabby.name: Krabby
krabby.description: It can be found near the sea. The large pincers grow back if they are torn out of their sockets.

kingler.name: Kingler
kingler.description: Its large and hard pincer has 10,000-horsepower strength. However, being so big, it is unwieldy to move.

kinglergmax.name: Kingler-Gmax
kinglergmax.description: The bubbles it spews out are strongly alkaline. Any opponents hit by them will have their bodies quickly melted away.

exeggcute.name: Exeggcute
exeggcute.description: Six of them together form a full-fledged Pokémon. It’s often hunted by Crabrawler, but uses psychokinesis to drive it off.

exeggutor.name: Exeggutor
exeggutor.description: When the time comes, one of its three heads falls off. Before long, the fallen head grows into an Exeggcute.

cubone.name: Cubone
cubone.description: The skull it wears on its head is that of its dead mother. According to some, it will evolve when it comes to terms with the pain of her death.

marowak.name: Marowak
marowak.description: This Pokémon is out for vengeance on its natural enemy, Mandibuzz. It throws bones like boomerangs to try to take it down.

hitmonlee.name: Hitmonlee
hitmonlee.evoCondition: with an Atk stat > its Def stat
hitmonlee.description: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

hitmonchan.name: Hitmonchan
hitmonchan.evoCondition: with an Atk stat < its Def stat
hitmonchan.description: Its punches slice the air. They are launched at such high speed, even a slight graze could cause a burn.

lickitung.name: Lickitung
lickitung.description: If this Pokémon’s sticky saliva gets on you and you don’t clean it off, an intense itch will set in. The itch won’t go away, either.

koffing.name: Koffing
koffing.description: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

weezing.name: Weezing
weezing.description: It mixes gases between its two bodies. It’s said that these Pokémon were seen all over the Galar region back in the day.

rhyhorn.name: Rhyhorn
rhyhorn.description: Strong, but not too bright, this Pokémon can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging tackles.

rhydon.name: Rhydon
rhydon.description: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.

chansey.name: Chansey
chansey.description: Not only are these Pokémon fast runners, they’re also few in number, so anyone who finds one must be lucky indeed.

tangela.name: Tangela
tangela.description: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon’s true appearance remains a mystery.

kangaskhan.name: Kangaskhan
kangaskhan.description: The child in its pouch leaves home after roughly three years. That is the only time the mother is heard to cry wildly.

kangaskhanmega.name: Kangaskhan-Mega
kangaskhanmega.description: Its child has grown rapidly, thanks to the energy of Mega Evolution. Mother and child show off their harmonious teamwork in battle.

horsea.name: Horsea
horsea.description: Horsea makes its home in oceans with gentle currents. If this Pokémon is under attack, it spits out pitch-black ink and escapes.

seadra.name: Seadra
seadra.description: It’s the males that raise the offspring. While Seadra are raising young, the spines on their backs secrete thicker and stronger poison.

goldeen.name: Goldeen
goldeen.description: Spellbound by the length of its horn and the beauty of its fins, many strange Trainers raise Goldeen and nothing but Goldeen.

seaking.name: Seaking
seaking.description: Trainers who are crazy for Seaking are divided into horn enthusiasts and fin enthusiasts. The two groups do not get along well.

staryu.name: Staryu
staryu.description: This Pokémon gets nibbled on by Lumineon and others. Thanks to its red core, it regenerates fast, so it’s unconcerned by their snack attacks.

starmie.name: Starmie
starmie.description: Its unusual body shape, reminiscent of abstract art, led local people to spread rumors that this Pokémon may be an invader from outer space.

starmiemega.name: Starmie-Mega
starmiemega.description: Its movements have become more humanlike. Whether it's simply trying to communicate or wants to supplant humanity is unclear.

scyther.name: Scyther
scyther.description: While young, they live together deep in the mountains, training themselves in how to fight with their scythes and move at high speeds.

jynx.name: Jynx
jynx.description: In certain parts of Galar, Jynx was once feared and worshiped as the Queen of Ice.

electabuzz.name: Electabuzz
electabuzz.description: Electricity leaks from it in amounts far greater than the amount of electricity it eats.

magmar.name: Magmar
magmar.description: When angered, it spouts brilliant fire from all over its body. It doesn’t calm down until its opponent has burned to ash.

pinsir.name: Pinsir
pinsir.description: One solid blow from its horns is enough to split apart a large tree. Its greatest rival in Alola is Vikavolt.

pinsirmega.name: Pinsir-Mega
pinsirmega.description: After Mega Evolution, it becomes able to fly. Perhaps because it's so happy, it rarely touches the ground.

tauros.name: Tauros
tauros.description: Although it’s known to be a fierce Pokémon, Tauros in the Alola region are said to possess a measure of calmness.

magikarp.name: Magikarp
magikarp.description: Its reckless leaps make it easy pickings for predators. On the bright side, many Pokémon enjoy longer life spans, thanks to Magikarp.

gyarados.name: Gyarados
gyarados.description: There are people who swear that any place Gyarados appears is fated for destruction.

gyaradosmega.name: Gyarados-Mega
gyaradosmega.description: It jets water from the orifices on its sides, streaking above the water surface at supersonic speed.

lapras.name: Lapras
lapras.description: These Pokémon were once near extinction due to poaching. Following protective regulations, there is now an overabundance of them.

laprasgmax.name: Lapras-Gmax
laprasgmax.description: It surrounds itself with a huge ring of gathered ice particles. It uses the ring to smash any icebergs that might impede its graceful swimming.

ditto.name: Ditto
ditto.description: With its astonishing capacity for metamorphosis, it can get along with anything. It does not get along well with its fellow Ditto.

eevee.name: Eevee
eevee.description: Current studies show it can evolve into an incredible eight different species of Pokémon.

eeveegmax.name: Eevee-Gmax
eeveegmax.description: Having gotten even friendlier and more innocent, Eevee tries to play with anyone around, only to end up crushing them with its immense body.

vaporeon.name: Vaporeon
vaporeon.description: Blending in with the water and erasing all signs of its presence, it patiently waits for its prey, fish Pokémon.

jolteon.name: Jolteon
jolteon.description: When its fur stands on end, that’s a sign it’s about to give off a jolt of electricity. Take care, as sometimes lightning strikes next to it, too.

flareon.name: Flareon
flareon.description: Its average body temperature is between 1,300 and 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. In its internal flame sac, temperatures reach 3,000 degrees.

porygon.name: Porygon
porygon.description: It can convert its body into digital data, which enables it to enter cyberspace.

omanyte.name: Omanyte
omanyte.description: Because some Omanyte manage to escape after being restored or are released into the wild by people, this species is becoming a problem.

omastar.name: Omastar
omastar.description: Weighed down by a large and heavy shell, Omastar couldn’t move very fast. Some say it went extinct because it was unable to catch food.

kabuto.name: Kabuto
kabuto.description: This species is almost entirely extinct. Kabuto molt every three days, making their shells harder and harder.

kabutops.name: Kabutops
kabutops.description: Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokémon.

aerodactyl.name: Aerodactyl
aerodactyl.description: In ancient times, it ruled the skies. A widely accepted theory is that it went extinct due to a large meteor impact.

aerodactylmega.name: Aerodactyl-Mega
aerodactylmega.description: Parts of its body have become stone. Some scholars claim that this is Aerodactyl's true appearance.

snorlax.name: Snorlax
snorlax.description: It eats nearly 900 pounds of food every day. It starts nodding off while eating—and continues to eat even while it’s asleep.

snorlaxgmax.name: Snorlax-Gmax
snorlaxgmax.description: Gigantamax energy has affected stray seeds and even pebbles that got stuck to Snorlax, making them grow to a huge size.

articuno.name: Articuno
articuno.description: It’s said that this Pokémon’s beautiful blue wings are made of ice. Articuno flies over snowy mountains, its long tail fluttering along behind it.

zapdos.name: Zapdos
zapdos.description: This Pokémon has complete control over electricity. There are tales of Zapdos nesting in the dark depths of pitch-black thunderclouds.

moltres.name: Moltres
moltres.description: It’s one of the legendary bird Pokémon. When Moltres flaps its flaming wings, they glimmer with a dazzling red glow.

dratini.name: Dratini
dratini.description: After a 10-hour struggle, a fisherman was able to pull one up and confirm its existence.

dragonair.name: Dragonair
dragonair.description: From time immemorial, it has been venerated by agricultural peoples as an entity able to control the weather.

dragonite.name: Dragonite
dragonite.description: Incur the wrath of this normally calm Pokémon at your peril, because it will smash everything to smithereens before it’s satisfied.

dragonitemega.name: Dragonite-Mega
dragonitemega.description: Mega Evolution has excessively powered up this Pokémon's feelings of kindness. It finishes off its opponents with mercy in its heart.

mewtwomegax.name: Mewtwo-Mega-X
mewtwomegax.description: Psychic power has augmented its muscles. It has a grip strength of one ton and can sprint 100 meters in two seconds flat!

mewtwomegay.name: Mewtwo-Mega-Y
mewtwomegay.description: Despite its diminished size, its mental power has grown phenomenally. With a mere thought, it can smash a skyscraper to smithereens.

meganium.name: Meganium
meganium.description: This Pokémon can fire a tremendously powerful Solar Beam from its four flowers. Another name for this is Mega Sol Cannon.

meganiummega.name: Meganium-Mega
meganiummega.description: This Pokémon can fire a tremendously powerful Solar Beam from its four flowers. Another name for this is Mega Sol Cannon.

feraligatrmega.name: Feraligatr-Mega
feraligatrmega.description: With its arms and hoodlike fin, this Pokémon forms a gigantic set of jaws with a bite 10 times as powerful as Mega Feraligatr's actual jaws.

hoothoot.name: Hoothoot
hoothoot.description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

noctowl.name: Noctowl
noctowl.description: Its eyes are specially developed to enable it to see clearly even in murky darkness and minimal light.

ledyba.name: Ledyba
ledyba.description: They communicate with one another using bodily fluids that give off odors. When they’re angry, their odor smells sour.

ledian.name: Ledian
ledian.description: In battle, it throws punches with all four arms. The power of each individual blow is piddly, so it aims to win by quantity rather than quality.

spinarak.name: Spinarak
spinarak.description: Some fishermen weave its sturdy thread into nets to catch fish Pokémon.

ariados.name: Ariados
ariados.description: It spins thread from both its rear and its mouth. Then it wraps its prey up in thread and sips their bodily fluids at its leisure.

crobat.name: Crobat
crobat.description: Silent and swift in its four-winged flight, it bites down on its prey before they realize what’s happening. In a heartbeat, it drains their blood.

chinchou.name: Chinchou
chinchou.description: It lives in the depths beyond the reach of sunlight. It flashes lights on its antennae to communicate with others of its kind.

lanturn.name: Lanturn
lanturn.description: This Pokémon flashes a bright light that blinds its prey. This creates an opening for it to deliver an electrical attack.

pichu.name: Pichu
pichu.description: Despite this Pokémon’s cute appearance, those who want to live with one should prepare to be on the receiving end of its electric jolts.

cleffa.name: Cleffa
cleffa.description: Because of its silhouette, it’s believed to be a star reborn. For some reason, it loves Minior.

igglybuff.name: Igglybuff
igglybuff.description: It moves by bouncing along. As it moves a lot, it sweats, and its body gives off a sweet aroma.

togepi.name: Togepi
togepi.description: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

togetic.name: Togetic
togetic.description: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.

natu.name: Natu
natu.description: It is extremely good at climbing tree trunks and likes to eat the new sprouts on the trees.

xatu.name: Xatu
xatu.description: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

ampharosmega.name: Ampharos-Mega
ampharosmega.description: Massive amounts of energy intensely stimulated Ampharos's cells, apparently awakening its long-sleeping dragon's blood.

bellossom.name: Bellossom
bellossom.description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

marill.name: Marill
marill.description: This Pokémon uses its round tail as a float. The ball of Marill’s tail is filled with nutrients that have been turned into an oil.

azumarill.name: Azumarill
azumarill.description: It spends most of its time in the water. On sunny days, Azumarill floats on the surface of the water and sunbathes.

sudowoodo.name: Sudowoodo
sudowoodo.description: Apparently, the larger the green parts of this Pokémon, the more collectors value it. It’s a particular favorite among elderly people.

politoed.name: Politoed
politoed.description: It’s the leader of Poliwag and Poliwhirl. When Politoed roars, they all cower in fear.

wooper.name: Wooper
wooper.description: This Pokémon lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

quagsire.name: Quagsire
quagsire.description: It has an easygoing nature. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head on boats and boulders while swimming.

espeon.name: Espeon
espeon.description: It unleashes psychic power from the orb on its forehead. When its power is exhausted, the orb grows dull and dark.

umbreon.name: Umbreon
umbreon.description: With its black fur, it blends into the darkness. It bides its time, and when prey appears, this Pokémon goes for its throat, and then eats it.

murkrow.name: Murkrow
murkrow.description: Seen as a symbol of bad luck, it’s generally disliked. Yet it gives presents—objects that sparkle or shine—to Trainers it’s close to.

slowking.name: Slowking
slowking.description: This Pokémon is so famed for its intellect that a proverb still persists in some regions: “When in doubt, ask Slowking.”

misdreavus.name: Misdreavus
misdreavus.description: If you hear a sobbing sound emanating from a vacant room, it’s undoubtedly a bit of mischief from Misdreavus.

wobbuffet.name: Wobbuffet
wobbuffet.description: It hates light and shock. If attacked, it inflates its body to pump up its counterstrike.

dunsparce.name: Dunsparce
dunsparce.description: This Pokémon’s tiny wings have some scientists saying that Dunsparce used to fly through the sky in ancient times.

steelix.name: Steelix
steelix.description: It is said that if an Onix lives for over 100 years, its composition changes to become diamond-like.

steelixmega.name: Steelix-Mega
steelixmega.description: To protect itself from opponents' attacks, it uses magnetism to control pieces of its hard outer shell that have flaked off.

snubbull.name: Snubbull
snubbull.description: Its growls make its opponents uneasy. This laid-back Pokémon tends to sleep half the day.

granbull.name: Granbull
granbull.description: More timid than Snubbull, this Pokémon is doted on by young people amused at the contrast between its looks and its attitude.

qwilfish.name: Qwilfish
qwilfish.description: When faced with a larger opponent, it swallows as much water as it can to match the opponent’s size.

scizor.name: Scizor
scizor.description: Once it has identified an enemy, this Pokémon smashes it mercilessly with pincers hard as steel.

scizormega.name: Scizor-Mega
scizormega.description: Due to the effects of Mega Evolution, its pincers have taken on a more diabolical form, ripping anything they pinch to shreds.

shuckle.name: Shuckle
shuckle.description: It stores berries inside its shell. To avoid attacks, it hides beneath rocks and remains completely still.

heracross.name: Heracross
heracross.description: Heracross loves sweet sap and will go looking through forests for it. The Pokémon uses its two antennae to pick up scents as it searches.

heracrossmega.name: Heracross-Mega
heracrossmega.description: It can grip things with its two horns and lift 500 times its own body weight.

sneasel.name: Sneasel
sneasel.description: It uses its claws to poke holes in eggs so it can slurp out the insides. Breeders consider it a scourge and will drive it away or eradicate it.

swinub.name: Swinub
swinub.description: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

piloswine.name: Piloswine
piloswine.description: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.

corsola.name: Corsola
corsola.description: Pursued by Mareanie for the branches on its head, this Pokémon will sometimes snap its own branches off as a diversion while it escapes.

remoraid.name: Remoraid
remoraid.description: The water they shoot from their mouths can hit moving prey from more than 300 feet away.

octillery.name: Octillery
octillery.description: It has a tendency to want to be in holes. It prefers rock crags or pots and sprays ink from them before attacking.

delibird.name: Delibird
delibird.description: It has a generous habit of sharing its food with people and Pokémon, so it’s always scrounging around for more food.

mantine.name: Mantine
mantine.description: If it builds up enough speed swimming, it can jump out above the waves and glide for over 300 feet.

skarmory.name: Skarmory
skarmory.description: Its metal body is sturdy, but it does rust rather easily. So on rainy days, this Pokémon prefers to stay put in its nest.

skarmorymega.name: Skarmory-Mega
skarmorymega.description: It flies faster than the speed of sound. After whipping up shock waves to send enemies flying, it finishes them off with its talons.

houndoommega.name: Houndoom-Mega
houndoommega.description: Houndoom's entire body generates heat when it Mega Evolves. Its intense, fiery breath turns its opponents to charcoal.

kingdra.name: Kingdra
kingdra.description: With the arrival of a storm at sea, this Pokémon will show itself on the surface. When a Kingdra and a Dragonite meet, a fierce battle ensues.

porygon2.name: Porygon2
porygon2.description: Porygon was updated to a new version in readiness for planetary development. But that dream remains unrealized as yet.

smeargle.name: Smeargle
smeargle.description: It draws symbols all over the place to mark its territory. In towns with many Smeargle, the walls are covered in graffiti.

tyrogue.name: Tyrogue
tyrogue.description: It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

hitmontop.name: Hitmontop
hitmontop.evoCondition: with an Atk stat equal to its Def stat
hitmontop.description: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

smoochum.name: Smoochum
smoochum.description: If its face gets even slightly dirty, Smoochum will bathe immediately. But if its body gets dirty, Smoochum doesn’t really seem to care.

elekid.name: Elekid
elekid.description: This Pokémon is constantly fighting with Togedemaru that try to steal its electricity. It’s a pretty even match.

magby.name: Magby
magby.description: A famous potter lives with a Magby. Apparently its soft flames produce fine works.

miltank.name: Miltank
miltank.description: Most people raise it for its milk, but it’s quite tough and strong, so it’s also well suited for battle.

blissey.name: Blissey
blissey.description: Its fluffy fur coat acts as a sensor, enabling it to read the feelings of people and Pokémon.

larvitar.name: Larvitar
larvitar.description: Born deep underground, it comes aboveground and becomes a pupa once it has finished eating the surrounding soil.

pupitar.name: Pupitar
pupitar.description: Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power.

tyranitar.name: Tyranitar
tyranitar.description: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

tyranitarmega.name: Tyranitar-Mega
tyranitarmega.description: The effects of Mega Evolution make it more ferocious than ever. It's unclear whether it can even hear its Trainer's orders.

celebi.name: Celebi
celebi.description: This Pokémon has the ability to move through time. Records describing it as a forest deity can be found from many different eras.

sceptilemega.name: Sceptile-Mega
sceptilemega.description: The seeds on its back are filled with energy from Mega Evolution. The Pokémon detonates these seeds to launch the tip of its tail.

blazikenmega.name: Blaziken-Mega
blazikenmega.description: Boiling-hot blood courses through its entire body, doubling the sharpness of its moves. It subdues opponents in the blink of an eye.

swampertmega.name: Swampert-Mega
swampertmega.description: The water within its body further strengthens its already enlarged muscles, using the same principles as a hydraulic pump.

zigzagoon.name: Zigzagoon
zigzagoon.description: It marks its territory by rubbing its bristly fur on trees. This variety of Zigzagoon is friendlier and calmer than the kind native to Galar.

linoone.name: Linoone
linoone.description: Its fur is strong and supple. Shaving brushes made with shed Linoone hairs are highly prized.

lotad.name: Lotad
lotad.description: It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.

lombre.name: Lombre
lombre.description: It is nocturnal and becomes active at nightfall. It feeds on aquatic mosses that grow in the riverbed.

ludicolo.name: Ludicolo
ludicolo.description: The rhythm of bright, festive music activates Ludicolo’s cells, making it more powerful.

seedot.name: Seedot
seedot.description: If it remains still, it looks just like a real nut. It delights in surprising foraging Pokémon.

nuzleaf.name: Nuzleaf
nuzleaf.description: It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.

shiftry.name: Shiftry
shiftry.description: A Pokémon that was feared as a forest guardian. It can read the foe’s mind and take preemptive action.

wingull.name: Wingull
wingull.description: Fishermen keep an eye out for Wingull in the sky, because wherever they’re circling, the ocean is sure to be teeming with fish Pokémon.

pelipper.name: Pelipper
pelipper.description: Gathering food is the work of young males. They store food in their capacious beaks and carry it back to others waiting in the nest.

ralts.name: Ralts
ralts.description: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility.

kirlia.name: Kirlia
kirlia.description: If its Trainer becomes happy, it overflows with energy, dancing joyously while spinning about.

gardevoir.name: Gardevoir
gardevoir.description: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

gardevoirmega.name: Gardevoir-Mega
gardevoirmega.description: When it opens the red plate on its chest and unleashes its heart, its strongest psychic power is released.

surskit.name: Surskit
surskit.description: When this Pokémon senses danger, a sweet fluid oozes from the tip of its head. The taste of it disgusts bird Pokémon.

masquerain.name: Masquerain
masquerain.description: Its wings and antennae don’t cope well with moisture. After a rain, it faces sunward to dry off.

nincada.name: Nincada
nincada.description: Because it lived almost entirely underground, it is nearly blind. It uses its antennae instead.

ninjask.name: Ninjask
ninjask.description: Its cry leaves a lasting headache if heard for too long. It moves so quickly that it is almost invisible.

shedinja.name: Shedinja
shedinja.description: A most peculiar Pokémon that somehow appears in a Poké Ball when a Nincada evolves.

whismur.name: Whismur
whismur.description: The cry of a Whismur is over 100 decibels. If you’re close to a Whismur when it lets out a cry, you’ll be stuck with an all-day headache.

loudred.name: Loudred
loudred.description: Loudred’s ears serve as speakers, and they can put out sound waves powerful enough to blow away a house.

exploud.name: Exploud
exploud.description: In the past, people would use the loud voices of these Pokémon as a means of communication between distant cities.

makuhita.name: Makuhita
makuhita.description: Their daily routine consists of training together first thing in the morning, eating and napping in the afternoon, and then more training afterward.

hariyama.name: Hariyama
hariyama.description: They love to compare their freakish strength— strength enough to send a truck flying with a single slap.

azurill.name: Azurill
azurill.description: The ball on Azurill’s tail bounces like a rubber ball, and it’s full of the nutrients the Pokémon needs to grow.

nosepass.name: Nosepass
nosepass.description: It uses powerful magnetism to drag its prey toward it. It’s also been known to pull in metal, which it collects and uses to protect itself.

sableye.name: Sableye
sableye.description: This Pokémon is feared. When its gemstone eyes begin to glow with a sinister shine, it’s believed that Sableye will steal people’s spirits away.

sableyemega.name: Sableye-Mega
sableyemega.description: The jewel from its chest, which has grown gigantic due to the effects of Mega Evolution, can turn back any attack.

mawile.name: Mawile
mawile.description: It uses its docile-looking face to lull foes into complacency, then bites with its huge, relentless jaws.

mawilemega.name: Mawile-Mega
mawilemega.description: Its two sets of jaws thrash about violently as if they each had a will of their own. One gnash from them can turn a boulder to dust.

aron.name: Aron
aron.description: It eats iron ore—and sometimes railroad tracks— to build up the steel armor that protects its body.

lairon.name: Lairon
lairon.description: Lairon live in mountains brimming with spring water and iron ore, so these Pokémon often came into conflict with humans in the past.

aggron.name: Aggron
aggron.description: Aggron has a horn sharp enough to perforate thick iron sheets. It brings down its opponents by ramming into them horn first.

aggronmega.name: Aggron-Mega
aggronmega.description: Energy from Mega Evolution has turned the iron inside this Pokémon into steel armor that covers Mega Aggron's whole body.

medichammega.name: Medicham-Mega
medichammega.description: Thanks to Mega Evolution, its mental power is limitless. It conjures up arms imbued with malice to defeat its enemies.

electrike.name: Electrike
electrike.description: It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

manectric.name: Manectric
manectric.description: It stimulates its own muscles with electricity, so it can move quickly. It eases its soreness with electricity, too, so it can recover quickly as well.

manectricmega.name: Manectric-Mega
manectricmega.description: Mega Evolution fills its body with a tremendous amount of electricity, but it's too much for Manectric to fully control.

roselia.name: Roselia
roselia.description: Its flowers give off a relaxing fragrance. The stronger its aroma, the healthier the Roselia is.

carvanha.name: Carvanha
carvanha.description: If they scent the faintest trace of blood, they rush to attack en masse. When alone, they’re rather cowardly.

sharpedo.name: Sharpedo
sharpedo.description: It has a sad history. In the past, its dorsal fin was a treasured foodstuff, so this Pokémon became a victim of overfishing.

sharpedomega.name: Sharpedo-Mega
sharpedomega.description: The spines sprouting from its head are transformed fangs. If they're injured or broken off, the spines will regenerate countless times.

wailmer.name: Wailmer
wailmer.description: It shows off by spraying jets of seawater from the nostrils above its eyes. It eats a solid ton of Wishiwashi every day.

wailord.name: Wailord
wailord.description: Its immense size is the reason for its popularity. Wailord watching is a favorite sightseeing activity in various parts of the world.

cameruptmega.name: Camerupt-Mega
cameruptmega.description: When this Pokémon's rage reaches a boiling point, the huge volcano in the hump on its back erupts violently, spewing molten lava.

torkoal.name: Torkoal
torkoal.description: If the fire burning within its shell goes out, it will die. Those who wish to raise one in their home must always keep something flammable at hand.

spinda.name: Spinda
spinda.description: Each and every Spinda has a slightly different configuration of spots. There are collectors who enjoy the tiny differences in their spot patterns.

trapinch.name: Trapinch
trapinch.description: As it digs through the sand, its giant jaws crush any rocks that obstruct its path. It builds a funnel-shaped nest.

vibrava.name: Vibrava
vibrava.description: To help make its wings grow, it dissolves quantities of prey in its digestive juices and guzzles them down every day.

flygon.name: Flygon
flygon.description: This Pokémon hides in the heart of sandstorms it creates and seldom appears where people can see it.

swablu.name: Swablu
swablu.description: Its cottony wings are full of air, making them light and fluffy to the touch. Swablu takes diligent care of its wings.

altaria.name: Altaria
altaria.description: As it flies in a calm and relaxed manner, Altaria performs a humming song that would enrapture any audience.

altariamega.name: Altaria-Mega
altariamega.description: Its down is so soft, it seems as if a touch could melt it. But it's strong enough that just a few strands could be used to hoist a dump truck.

lunatone.name: Lunatone
lunatone.description: The phase of the moon apparently has some effect on its power. It’s active on the night of a full moon.

solrock.name: Solrock
solrock.description: When it rotates itself, it gives off light similar to the sun, thus blinding its foes.

barboach.name: Barboach
barboach.description: Its slippery body is hard to grasp, so much so that there are festivals where people compete to see how many they can catch barehanded.

whiscash.name: Whiscash
whiscash.description: Sighting Whiscash leaping from the water is believed to herald an earthquake.

corphish.name: Corphish
corphish.description: No matter how dirty the water in the river, it will adapt and thrive. It has a strong will to survive.

crawdaunt.name: Crawdaunt
crawdaunt.description: A rough customer that wildly flails its giant claws. It is said to be extremely hard to raise.

baltoy.name: Baltoy
baltoy.description: It moves while spinning around on its single foot. Some Baltoy have been seen spinning on their heads.

claydol.name: Claydol
claydol.description: This mysterious Pokémon started life as an ancient clay figurine made over 20,000 years ago.

lileep.name: Lileep
lileep.description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. Lileep once lived in warm seas that existed approximately 100,000,000 years ago.

cradily.name: Cradily
cradily.description: It has short legs and can’t walk very fast, but its neck and tentacles can extend to over three times their usual length to nab distant prey.

anorith.name: Anorith
anorith.description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. Anorith lived in the ocean about 100,000,000 years ago, hunting with its pair of claws.

armaldo.name: Armaldo
armaldo.description: After evolution, this Pokémon emerged onto land. Its lower body has become stronger, and blows from its tail are devastating.

feebas.name: Feebas
feebas.description: Although unattractive and unpopular, this Pokémon’s marvelous vitality has made it a subject of research.

milotic.name: Milotic
milotic.description: It lives at the bottom of clear lakes. In times of war, it shows itself, which soothes people’s minds and hearts.

castform.name: Castform
castform.description: Its form changes on its own, due to its cells’ sensitive reactions to temperature and humidity.

banettemega.name: Banette-Mega
banettemega.description: Mega Evolution increases its vindictiveness, and the cursing power that was held back by its zipper comes spilling out.

duskull.name: Duskull
duskull.description: If it finds bad children who won’t listen to their parents, it will spirit them away—or so it’s said.

dusclops.name: Dusclops
dusclops.description: Its body is entirely hollow. When it opens its mouth, it sucks everything in as if it were a black hole.

chimechomega.name: Chimecho-Mega
chimechomega.description: It vibrates its entire body to attack in all directions using sound waves. Any who hear the vibrations get so confused, they forget who they are.

absol.name: Absol
absol.description: Although it’s said to bring disaster, in actuality, this Pokémon possesses a calm disposition and warns people of any crises that loom.

absolmega.name: Absol-Mega
absolmega.description: Using fur that it has made into sharp, clawlike shapes, it cuts down foes with a single blow. This is an act of kindness to keep them from suffering.

absolmegaz.name: Absol-Mega-Z
absolmegaz.description: Using fur that it has made into sharp, clawlike shapes, it cuts down foes with a single blow. This is an act of kindness to keep them from suffering.

wynaut.name: Wynaut
wynaut.description: It tends to move in a pack. Individuals squash against one another to toughen their spirits.

snorunt.name: Snorunt
snorunt.description: It can only survive in cold areas. It bounces happily around, even in environments as cold as -150 degrees Fahrenheit.

glalie.name: Glalie
glalie.description: Its prey is instantaneously frozen stiff by the cold air it exhales from its huge mouth. While they’re in that frozen state, it gobbles them up.

glaliemega.name: Glalie-Mega
glaliemega.description: When it spews stupendously cold air from its broken mouth, the entire area around it gets whited out.

spheal.name: Spheal
spheal.description: This Pokémon’s body is covered in blubber and impressively round. It’s faster for Spheal to roll around than walk.

sealeo.name: Sealeo
sealeo.description: Sealeo live on top of drift ice. They go swimming when they’re on the hunt, seeking out their prey by scent.

walrein.name: Walrein
walrein.description: Walrein form herds of 20 to 30 individuals. When a threat appears, the herd’s leader will protect the group with its life.

relicanth.name: Relicanth
relicanth.description: It was fortuitously discovered during a deep sea expedition. Its teeth have atrophied, so it now survives on microscopic organisms it sucks up.

luvdisc.name: Luvdisc
luvdisc.description: Loving couples have a soft spot for this Pokémon, so honeymoon hotels often release this Pokémon into their pools.

bagon.name: Bagon
bagon.description: With its steel-hard stone head, it headbutts indiscriminately. This is because of the stress it feels at being unable to fly.

shelgon.name: Shelgon
shelgon.description: They lurk deep within caves—motionless, neither eating nor drinking. Why they don’t die is not known.

salamence.name: Salamence
salamence.description: It flies around on its wings, which have grown in at last. In its happiness, it gushes hot flames, burning up the fields it passes over.

salamencemega.name: Salamence-Mega
salamencemega.description: To streamline itself for flight, it pulls its forelegs into its shell. Salamence flies at high speeds even when faced with complex topographical features.

beldum.name: Beldum
beldum.description: With magnetic traction, it pulls its opponents in close. When they’re in range, it slashes them with its rear claws.

metang.name: Metang
metang.description: It adores magnetic minerals, so it pursues Nosepass at speeds exceeding 60 mph.

metagross.name: Metagross
metagross.description: A linkage of two Metang, this Pokémon can perform any calculation in a flash by utilizing parallel processing in its four brains.

metagrossmega.name: Metagross-Mega
metagrossmega.description: This form results from one Metagross, one Metang, and two Beldum linking up.

regirock.name: Regirock
regirock.description: Every bit of Regirock’s body is made of stone. As parts of its body erode, this Pokémon sticks rocks to itself to repair what’s been lost.

regice.name: Regice
regice.description: With cold air that can reach temperatures as low as −328 degrees Fahrenheit, Regice instantly freezes any creature that approaches it.

registeel.name: Registeel
registeel.description: Registeel’s body is made of a strange material that is flexible enough to stretch and shrink but also more durable than any metal.

latiasmega.name: Latias-Mega
latiasmega.description: Both its flying capabilities and its attack power have increased. It scatters transparent down to confuse its enemies.

latiosmega.name: Latios-Mega
latiosmega.description: It flies at speeds exceeding Mach 4. It is among the top tier of all Pokémon in terms of aerial combat capability.

rayquazamega.name: Rayquaza-Mega
rayquazamega.description: A shooting star streaking across the night sky may, in fact, be Mega Rayquaza flying gracefully after a meteoroid.

jirachi.name: Jirachi
jirachi.description: Once every 1,000 years, the singing of a pure voice will rouse this Pokémon from its near- perpetual slumber. It wakes for only seven days.

staraptormega.name: Staraptor-Mega
staraptormega.description: Mega Staraptor is a top-class flier. It can easily soar through the sky while gripping a Steelix that weighs more than 880 lbs.

shinx.name: Shinx
shinx.description: This Pokémon generates electricity by contracting its muscles. Excited trembling is a sign that Shinx is generating a tremendous amount of electricity.

luxio.name: Luxio
luxio.description: By joining its tail with that of another Luxio, this Pokémon can receive some of the other Luxio’s electricity and power up its own electric blasts.

luxray.name: Luxray
luxray.description: Luxray can see through solid objects. It will instantly spot prey trying to hide behind walls, even if the walls are thick.

budew.name: Budew
budew.description: The pollen it releases contains poison. If this Pokémon is raised on clean water, the poison’s toxicity is increased.

roserade.name: Roserade
roserade.description: After captivating opponents with its sweet scent, it lashes them with its thorny whips.

cranidos.name: Cranidos
cranidos.description: In rock layers where Cranidos fossils are found, the fossilized trunks of trees snapped in two are also often found.

rampardos.name: Rampardos
rampardos.description: Records exist of a revived fossil that evolved into Rampardos. It proceeded to escape and then destroy a skyscraper with a headbutt.

shieldon.name: Shieldon
shieldon.description: This Pokémon lived in primeval jungles. Few enemies would have been willing to square off against its heavily armored face, so it’s thought.

bastiodon.name: Bastiodon
bastiodon.description: It lived in the same environments as Rampardos. Their fossils have been found together— seemingly from after they’d fought to the finish.

combee.name: Combee
combee.description: The members of the trio spend all their time together. Each one has a slightly different taste in nectar.

vespiquen.name: Vespiquen
vespiquen.description: It skillfully commands its grubs in battles with its enemies. The grubs are willing to risk their lives to defend Vespiquen.

cherubi.name: Cherubi
cherubi.description: It nimbly dashes about to avoid getting pecked by bird Pokémon that would love to make off with its small, nutrient-rich storage ball.

cherrim.name: Cherrim
cherrim.description: As a bud, it barely moves. It sits still, placidly waiting for sunlight to appear.

shellos.name: Shellos
shellos.description: Purple mucus sticks to the hands of anyone who touches it. Take care, as the substance is troublesome to wash off.

gastrodon.name: Gastrodon
gastrodon.description: Plankton, invisible to the naked eye, is its main food source. It comes onto the land periodically, but the reason for this is not known.

drifloon.name: Drifloon
drifloon.description: If for some reason its body bursts, its soul spills out with a screaming sound.

drifblim.name: Drifblim
drifblim.description: Even while under careful observation, large flocks of Drifblim flying at dusk will inexplicably disappear from view.

buneary.name: Buneary
buneary.description: If both of Buneary’s ears are rolled up, something is wrong with its body or mind. It’s a sure sign the Pokémon is in need of care.

lopunny.name: Lopunny
lopunny.description: Lopunny is constantly monitoring its surroundings. If danger approaches, this Pokémon responds with superdestructive kicks.

lopunnymega.name: Lopunny-Mega
lopunnymega.description: It swings its ears like whips and strikes its enemies with them. It has an intensely combative disposition.

mismagius.name: Mismagius
mismagius.description: Mismagius have been known to cast spells to make people fall in love, so some people search for this Pokémon as if their life depended on it.

honchkrow.name: Honchkrow
honchkrow.description: If its Murkrow cronies fail to catch food for it, or if it feels they have betrayed it, it will hunt them down wherever they are and punish them.

stunky.name: Stunky
stunky.description: From its rear, it sprays a foul-smelling liquid at opponents. It aims for their faces, and it can hit them from over 16 feet away.

skuntank.name: Skuntank
skuntank.description: In its belly, it reserves stinky fluid that it shoots from its tail during battle. As this Pokémon’s diet varies, so does the stench of its fluid.

bronzor.name: Bronzor
bronzor.description: It appears in ancient ruins. The pattern on its body doesn’t come from any culture in the Galar region, so it remains shrouded in mystery.

bronzong.name: Bronzong
bronzong.description: Some believe it to be a deity that summons rain clouds. When angered, it lets out a warning cry that rings out like the tolling of a bell.

bonsly.name: Bonsly
bonsly.description: From its eyes, it can expel excess moisture from its body. This liquid is similar in composition to human sweat.

happiny.name: Happiny
happiny.description: It’s too small to lay eggs yet. As a surrogate, it searches out round white stones.

spiritomb.name: Spiritomb
spiritomb.description: Exactly 108 spirits gathered to become this Pokémon. Apparently there are some ill-natured spirits in the mix.

gible.name: Gible
gible.description: It skulks in caves, and when prey or an enemy passes by, it leaps out and chomps them. The force of its attack sometimes chips its teeth.

gabite.name: Gabite
gabite.description: Shiny objects are its passion. It can be found in its cave, scarcely moving, its gaze fixed on the jewels it’s amassed or Carbink it has caught.

garchomp.name: Garchomp
garchomp.description: The protuberances on its head serve as sensors. It can even detect distant prey.

garchompmega.name: Garchomp-Mega
garchompmega.description: Its disposition is more vicious than before its Mega Evolution. Garchomp carves its opponents up with the scythes on both arms.

garchompmegaz.name: Garchomp-Mega-Z
garchompmegaz.description: Garchomp has gained a new Mega-Evolved form. It flies around foes at Mach speed and cuts them to shreds with its sinister wing claws.

munchlax.name: Munchlax
munchlax.description: When it finds something that looks like it might be edible, it goes right ahead and swallows it whole. That’s why it gets fatter day by day.

riolu.name: Riolu
riolu.description: It’s tough enough to run right through the night, and it’s also a hard worker, but it’s still just a youngster.

lucario.name: Lucario
lucario.description: They can detect the species of a living being— and its emotions—from over half a mile away. They control auras and hunt their prey in packs.

lucariomega.name: Lucario-Mega
lucariomega.description: Black streaks all over its body show where its auras and the energy of Mega Evolution intermingled and raced through it.

lucariomegaz.name: Lucario-Mega-Z
lucariomegaz.description: By completely cloaking itself in its aura, Mega Lucario Z can parry all manner of attacks, battling as if it were gracefully dancing.

hippopotas.name: Hippopotas
hippopotas.description: It moves through the sands with its mouth open, swallowing sand along with its prey. It gets rid of the sand by spouting it from its nose.

hippowdon.name: Hippowdon
hippowdon.description: Stones can get stuck in the ports on their bodies. Dwebble help dislodge such stones, so Hippowdon look after these Pokémon.

skorupi.name: Skorupi
skorupi.description: After burrowing into the sand, it waits patiently for prey to come near. This Pokémon and Sizzlipede share common descent.

drapion.name: Drapion
drapion.description: Its poison is potent, but it rarely sees use. This Pokémon prefers to use physical force instead, going on rampages with its car-crushing strength.

croagunk.name: Croagunk
croagunk.description: It makes frightening noises with its poison-filled cheek sacs. When opponents flinch, Croagunk hits them with a poison jab.

toxicroak.name: Toxicroak
toxicroak.description: It bounces toward opponents and gouges them with poisonous claws. No more than a scratch is needed to knock out its adversaries.

finneon.name: Finneon
finneon.description: Its double tail fins propel its energetic jumps. When it breaks the surface of the sea, Wingull swoop down to grab it on the fly.

lumineon.name: Lumineon
lumineon.description: This deep-sea Pokémon lives at the bottom of the sea. Its fins haul it over the seabed in search of its favorite food—Starmie.

mantyke.name: Mantyke
mantyke.description: Mantyke living in Galar seem to be somewhat sluggish. The colder waters of the seas in this region may be the cause.

snover.name: Snover
snover.description: It lives on snowy mountains. It sinks its legs into the snow to absorb water and keep its own temperature down.

abomasnow.name: Abomasnow
abomasnow.description: If it sees any packs of Darumaka going after Snover, it chases them off, swinging its sizable arms like hammers.

abomasnowmega.name: Abomasnow-Mega
abomasnowmega.description: The buds on its back have sprouted into impressive icicles that can whip up massive blizzards of −22 degrees Fahrenheit.

weavile.name: Weavile
weavile.description: They dwell in cold places. This Pokémon’s main food source in Alola is Vulpix and Sandshrew, which they carefully divide among their group.

magnezone.name: Magnezone
magnezone.description: As it zooms through the sky, this Pokémon seems to be receiving signals of unknown origin, while transmitting signals of unknown purpose.

lickilicky.name: Lickilicky
lickilicky.description: Lickilicky’s strange tongue can stretch to many times the length of its body. No one has figured out how Lickilicky’s tongue can stretch so far.

rhyperior.name: Rhyperior
rhyperior.description: It can load up to three projectiles per arm into the holes in its hands. What launches out of those holes could be either rocks or Roggenrola.

tangrowth.name: Tangrowth
tangrowth.description: Tangrowth has two arms that it can extend as it pleases. Recent research has shown that these arms are, in fact, bundles of vines.

electivire.name: Electivire
electivire.description: When it gets excited, it thumps its chest. With every thud, thunder roars and electric sparks shower all around.

magmortar.name: Magmortar
magmortar.description: From its arm, it launches fireballs hotter than 3,500 degrees Fahrenheit. Its arm starts to melt when it fires a whole barrage.

togekiss.name: Togekiss
togekiss.description: These Pokémon are never seen anywhere near conflict or turmoil. In recent times, they’ve hardly been seen at all.

leafeon.name: Leafeon
leafeon.description: The younger they are, the more they smell like fresh grass. With age, their fragrance takes on the odor of fallen leaves.

glaceon.name: Glaceon
glaceon.description: It freezes its fur into icicles, spiky and sharp, and tackles its prey.

mamoswine.name: Mamoswine
mamoswine.description: This Pokémon can be spotted in wall paintings from as far back as 10,000 years ago. For a while, it was thought to have gone extinct.

porygonz.name: Porygon-Z
porygonz.description: Its program was modified to facilitate extra-dimensional activities, but that led to noticeably strange behavior.

gallade.name: Gallade
gallade.description: True to its honorable-warrior image, it uses the blades on its elbows only in defense of something or someone.

gallademega.name: Gallade-Mega
gallademega.description: It gets power from the bond it has with its Trainer. Mega Evolution has given it plates to slice its enemies and a cape to protect its body.

probopass.name: Probopass
probopass.description: The main body controls three mobile units called Mini-Noses, which it maneuvers to catch prey.

dusknoir.name: Dusknoir
dusknoir.description: At the bidding of transmissions from the spirit world, it steals people and Pokémon away. No one knows whether it has a will of its own.

froslass.name: Froslass
froslass.description: The soul of a woman lost on a snowy mountain possessed an icicle, becoming this Pokémon. The food it most relishes is the souls of men.

froslassmega.name: Froslass-Mega
froslassmega.description: This Pokémon can use eerie cold air imbued with ghost energy to freeze even insubstantial things, such as flames or the wind.

rotom.name: Rotom
rotom.description: One boy’s invention led to the development of many different machines that take advantage of Rotom’s unique capabilities.

heatranmega.name: Heatran-Mega
heatranmega.description: It's said that if it goes all out, it can heat its body up to temperatures over 1.8 million degrees Fahrenheit. This heat keeps enemies at bay.

regigigas.name: Regigigas
regigigas.description: All over the world, there are legends that tell of Regigigas creating other Pokémon in its own image.

darkraimega.name: Darkrai-Mega
darkraimega.description: Its dark power blocks out the sun, plunging the surrounding area into darkness. There is no escaping its evil eye.

emboarmega.name: Emboar-Mega
emboarmega.description: Brandishing a blazing flame shaped like a serpentine spear, it rushes in to rescue its imperiled allies.

lillipup.name: Lillipup
lillipup.description: The long fur surrounding its face functions as radar, enabling it to probe the condition of its battle opponents.

herdier.name: Herdier
herdier.description: This Pokémon obeys its master’s orders faithfully. However, it refuses to listen to anything said by a person it doesn’t respect.

stoutland.name: Stoutland
stoutland.description: With this wise Pokémon, there could be no concern that it would ever attack people. Some parents even trust it to babysit.

purrloin.name: Purrloin
purrloin.description: It steals things from people just to amuse itself with their frustration. A rivalry exists between this Pokémon and Nickit.

liepard.name: Liepard
liepard.description: Don’t be fooled by its gorgeous fur and elegant figure. This is a moody and vicious Pokémon.

munna.name: Munna
munna.description: Late at night, it appears beside people’s pillows. As it feeds on dreams, the patterns on its body give off a faint glow.

musharna.name: Musharna
musharna.description: When dark mists emanate from its body, don’t get too near. If you do, your nightmares will become reality.

pidove.name: Pidove
pidove.description: Where people go, these Pokémon follow. If you’re scattering food for them, be careful— several hundred of them can gather at once.

tranquill.name: Tranquill
tranquill.description: It can fly moderately quickly. No matter how far it travels, it can always find its way back to its master and its nest.

unfezant.name: Unfezant
unfezant.description: Unfezant are exceptional fliers. The females are known for their stamina, while the males outclass them in terms of speed.

roggenrola.name: Roggenrola
roggenrola.description: The hexagonal cavity is its ear. It walks in the direction of sounds it hears, but if the sounds cease, it panics and topples over.

boldore.name: Boldore
boldore.description: It explores caves in search of underground water. It’s not comfortable around water, so this Pokémon takes great care in lapping it up.

gigalith.name: Gigalith
gigalith.description: Known for its hefty horsepower, this Pokémon is a popular partner for construction workers.

woobat.name: Woobat
woobat.description: While inside a cave, if you look up and see lots of heart-shaped marks lining the walls, it’s evidence that Woobat live there.

swoobat.name: Swoobat
swoobat.description: Emitting powerful sound waves tires it out. Afterward, it won’t be able to fly for a little while.

drilbur.name: Drilbur
drilbur.description: It brings its claws together and whirls around at high speed before rushing toward its prey.

excadrill.name: Excadrill
excadrill.description: It’s not uncommon for tunnels that appear to have formed naturally to actually be a result of Excadrill’s rampant digging.

excadrillmega.name: Excadrill-Mega
excadrillmega.description: If this Pokémon brings its arms and head together to form a streamlined shape and spins at high speeds, it can destroy anything.

audino.name: Audino
audino.description: Audino’s sense of hearing is superb. Not even a pebble rolling along over a mile away will escape Audino’s ears.

audinomega.name: Audino-Mega
audinomega.description: Anyone who touches the secondary feelers that have sprouted from the base of its throat will fall into a deep sleep.

timburr.name: Timburr
timburr.description: It loves helping out with construction projects. It loves it so much that if rain causes work to halt, it swings its log around and throws a tantrum.

gurdurr.name: Gurdurr
gurdurr.description: It shows off its muscles to Machoke and other Gurdurr. If it fails to measure up to the other Pokémon, it lies low for a little while.

conkeldurr.name: Conkeldurr
conkeldurr.description: Concrete mixed by Conkeldurr is much more durable than normal concrete, even when the compositions of the two materials are the same.

tympole.name: Tympole
tympole.description: Graceful ripples running across the water’s surface are a sure sign that Tympole are singing in high-pitched voices below.

palpitoad.name: Palpitoad
palpitoad.description: It weakens its prey with sound waves intense enough to cause headaches, then entangles them with its sticky tongue.

seismitoad.name: Seismitoad
seismitoad.description: The vibrating of the bumps all over its body causes earthquake-like tremors. Seismitoad and Croagunk are similar species.

throh.name: Throh
throh.description: It performs throwing moves with first-rate skill. Over the course of many battles, Throh’s belt grows darker as it absorbs its wearer’s sweat.

sawk.name: Sawk
sawk.description: If you see a Sawk training in the mountains in its single-minded pursuit of strength, it’s best to quietly pass by.

venipede.name: Venipede
venipede.description: Venipede and Sizzlipede are similar species, but when the two meet, a huge fight ensues.

whirlipede.name: Whirlipede
whirlipede.description: This Pokémon spins itself rapidly and charges into its opponents. Its top speed is just over 60 mph.

scolipede.name: Scolipede
scolipede.description: Scolipede latches on to its prey with the claws on its neck before slamming them into the ground and jabbing them with its claws’ toxic spikes.

scolipedemega.name: Scolipede-Mega
scolipedemega.description: Its deadly venom gives off a faint glow. The venom affects Scolipede's mind, honing its viciousness.

cottonee.name: Cottonee
cottonee.description: Pillows and beds stuffed with cotton exhaled by Cottonee are soft and puffy, light and airy— altogether top quality.

whimsicott.name: Whimsicott
whimsicott.description: This Pokémon appears, riding upon the wind. But if the wind gusts up, it’ll blow the cotton on this Pokémon’s head clean off.

petilil.name: Petilil
petilil.description: By pruning the leaves on its head with regularity, this Pokémon can be grown into a fine plump shape.

lilligant.name: Lilligant
lilligant.description: As soon as it finds a male to be its partner, the beautiful flower on its head darkens, droops, and withers away.

basculin.name: Basculin
basculin.description: Anglers love the fight this Pokémon puts up on the hook. And there are always more to catch— many people release them into lakes illicitly.

sandile.name: Sandile
sandile.description: It conceals itself in the sand and chomps down on the legs of any prey that unwarily walk over it. Its favorite food is Trapinch.

krokorok.name: Krokorok
krokorok.description: Thanks to the special membrane covering its eyes, it can see its surroundings clearly, even in the middle of the night.

krookodile.name: Krookodile
krookodile.description: After clamping down with its powerful jaws, it twists its body around to rip its prey in half.

darumaka.name: Darumaka
darumaka.description: It derives its power from fire burning inside its body. If the fire dwindles, this Pokémon will immediately fall asleep.

darmanitan.name: Darmanitan
darmanitan.description: The thick arms of this hot-blooded Pokémon can deliver punches capable of obliterating a dump truck.

maractus.name: Maractus
maractus.description: With noises that could be mistaken for the rattles of maracas, it creates an upbeat rhythm, startling bird Pokémon and making them fly off in a hurry.

dwebble.name: Dwebble
dwebble.description: When it finds a stone appealing, it creates a hole inside it and uses it as its home. This Pokémon is the natural enemy of Roggenrola and Rolycoly.

crustle.name: Crustle
crustle.description: This highly territorial Pokémon prefers dry climates. It won’t come out of its boulder on rainy days.

scraggy.name: Scraggy
scraggy.description: If it locks eyes with you, watch out! Nothing and no one is safe from the reckless headbutts of this troublesome Pokémon.

scrafty.name: Scrafty
scrafty.description: As halfhearted as this Pokémon’s kicks may seem, they pack enough power to shatter Conkeldurr’s concrete pillars.

scraftymega.name: Scrafty-Mega
scraftymega.description: Mega Evolution has caused Scrafty's shed skin to turn white, growing tough and supple. Of course, this Pokémon is still as feisty as ever.

sigilyph.name: Sigilyph
sigilyph.description: Psychic power allows these Pokémon to fly. Some say they were the guardians of an ancient city. Others say they were the guardians’ emissaries.

yamask.name: Yamask
yamask.description: It wanders through ruins by night, carrying a mask that’s said to have been the face it had when it was still human.

cofagrigus.name: Cofagrigus
cofagrigus.description: This Pokémon has a body of sparkling gold. People say it no longer remembers that it was once human.

tirtouga.name: Tirtouga
tirtouga.description: Reputed to be the ancestor of most turtle Pokémon, it lived in warm seas approximately a hundred million years ago.

carracosta.name: Carracosta
carracosta.description: Active both on land and in the sea, this Pokémon drags its land-based prey into the water to finish it off.

archen.name: Archen
archen.description: To all appearances flightless, it was able to glide down from tall treetops to snag its prey.

archeops.name: Archeops
archeops.description: They hunted in flocks. When one Archeops had the prey cornered, another would swoop on it.

trubbish.name: Trubbish
trubbish.description: It gorges on trash until its stomach is full. Then it belches toxic gas. An unlucky whiff of gas will put a person in the hospital.

garbodor.name: Garbodor
garbodor.description: For a time, their numbers increased explosively in Alola. Since the arrival of Grimer, their population has decreased dramatically.

garbodorgmax.name: Garbodor-Gmax
garbodorgmax.description: It sprays toxic gas from its mouth and fingers. If the gas engulfs you, the toxins will seep in all the way down to your bones.

zorua.name: Zorua
zorua.description: Zorua is a timid Pokémon. This disposition seems to be what led to the development of Zorua’s ability to take on the forms of other creatures.

zoroark.name: Zoroark
zoroark.description: This Pokémon cares deeply about others of its kind, and it will conjure terrifying illusions to keep its den and pack safe.

minccino.name: Minccino
minccino.description: The way it brushes away grime with its tail can be helpful when cleaning. But its focus on spotlessness can make cleaning more of a hassle.

cinccino.name: Cinccino
cinccino.description: Its body secretes oil that this Pokémon spreads over its nest as a coating to protect it from dust. Cinccino won’t tolerate even a speck of the stuff.

gothita.name: Gothita
gothita.description: Though they’re still only babies, there’s psychic power stored in their ribbonlike feelers, and sometimes they use that power to fight.

gothorita.name: Gothorita
gothorita.description: It’s said that when stars shine in the night sky, this Pokémon will spirit away sleeping children. Some call it the Witch of Punishment.

gothitelle.name: Gothitelle
gothitelle.description: It has tremendous psychic power, but it dislikes conflict. It’s also able to predict the future based on the movement of the stars.

solosis.name: Solosis
solosis.description: It communicates with others telepathically. Its body is encapsulated in liquid, but if it takes a heavy blow, the liquid will leak out.

duosion.name: Duosion
duosion.description: Its psychic power can supposedly cover a range of more than half a mile—but only if its two brains can agree with each other.

reuniclus.name: Reuniclus
reuniclus.description: While it could use its psychic abilities in battle, this Pokémon prefers to swing its powerful arms around to beat opponents into submission.

vanillite.name: Vanillite
vanillite.description: It feels pleasantly cool when embraced. This Pokémon is treasured by households in warm regions.

vanillish.name: Vanillish
