vanillish.description: This Pokémon has existed since the Ice Age. It controls particles of ice, freezes its opponents, and then shatters them with a headbutt.

vanilluxe.name: Vanilluxe
vanilluxe.description: Even if it loses one of its heads, it can live relatively problem-free. It makes snow clouds inside its body.

emolga.name: Emolga
emolga.description: It grills berries and bug Pokémon with electric shocks and makes a meal of them. It usually nests in the holes gouged in trees by Pikipek.

karrablast.name: Karrablast
karrablast.description: Its strange physiology reacts to electrical energy in interesting ways. The presence of a Shelmet will cause this Pokémon to evolve.

escavalier.name: Escavalier
escavalier.description: They use shells they’ve stolen from Shelmet to arm and protect themselves. They’re very popular Pokémon in the Galar region.

foongus.name: Foongus
foongus.description: No one knows what the Poké Ball–like pattern on Foongus means or why Foongus has it.

amoonguss.name: Amoonguss
amoonguss.description: This Pokémon puffs poisonous spores at its foes. If the spores aren’t washed off quickly, they’ll grow into mushrooms wherever they land.

frillish.name: Frillish
frillish.description: It envelops its prey in its veillike arms and draws it down to the deeps, five miles below the ocean’s surface.

jellicent.name: Jellicent
jellicent.description: Most of this Pokémon’s body composition is identical to sea water. It makes sunken ships its lair.

alomomola.name: Alomomola
alomomola.description: They float upon the open sea. Many water Pokémon gather in the area around Alomomola.

joltik.name: Joltik
joltik.description: Joltik can be found clinging to other Pokémon. It’s soaking up static electricity because it can’t produce a charge on its own.

galvantula.name: Galvantula
galvantula.description: It launches electrified fur from its abdomen as its means of attack. Opponents hit by the fur could be in for three full days and nights of paralysis.

ferroseed.name: Ferroseed
ferroseed.description: It defends itself by launching spikes, but its aim isn’t very good at first. Only after a lot of practice will it improve.

ferrothorn.name: Ferrothorn
ferrothorn.description: This Pokémon scrapes its spikes across rocks, and then uses the tips of its feelers to absorb the nutrients it finds within the stone.

klink.name: Klink
klink.description: The two minigears that compose this Pokémon are closer than twins. They mesh well only with each other.

klang.name: Klang
klang.description: When Klang goes all out, the minigear links up perfectly with the outer part of the big gear, and this Pokémon’s rotation speed increases sharply.

klinklang.name: Klinklang
klinklang.description: From its spikes, it launches powerful blasts of electricity. Its red core contains an enormous amount of energy.

eelektrossmega.name: Eelektross-Mega
eelektrossmega.description: It now generates 10 times the electricity it did before Mega Evolving. It discharges this electricity from its false Eelektrik, which are made of mucus.

elgyem.name: Elgyem
elgyem.description: If this Pokémon stands near a TV, strange scenery will appear on the screen. That scenery is said to be from its home.

beheeyem.name: Beheeyem
beheeyem.description: Whenever a Beheeyem visits a farm, a Dubwool mysteriously disappears.

litwick.name: Litwick
litwick.description: The flame on its head keeps its body slightly warm. This Pokémon takes lost children by the hand to guide them to the spirit world.

lampent.name: Lampent
lampent.description: This Pokémon appears just before someone passes away, so it’s feared as an emissary of death.

chandelure.name: Chandelure
chandelure.description: This Pokémon haunts dilapidated mansions. It sways its arms to hypnotize opponents with the ominous dancing of its flames.

chandeluremega.name: Chandelure-Mega
chandeluremega.description: One of its eyes is a window linking our world with the afterlife. This Pokémon draws in hatred and converts it into power.

axew.name: Axew
axew.description: These Pokémon nest in the ground and use their tusks to crush hard berries. Crushing berries is also how they test each other’s strength.

fraxure.name: Fraxure
fraxure.description: After battle, this Pokémon carefully sharpens its tusks on river rocks. It needs to take care of its tusks—if one breaks, it will never grow back.

haxorus.name: Haxorus
haxorus.description: Its resilient tusks are its pride and joy. It licks up dirt to take in the minerals it needs to keep its tusks in top condition.

cubchoo.name: Cubchoo
cubchoo.description: When this Pokémon is in good health, its snot becomes thicker and stickier. It will smear its snot on anyone it doesn’t like.

beartic.name: Beartic
beartic.description: It swims through frigid seas, searching for prey. From its frozen breath, it forms icy fangs that are harder than steel.

cryogonal.name: Cryogonal
cryogonal.description: With its icy chains, Cryogonal freezes those it encounters. It then takes its victims away to somewhere unknown.

shelmet.name: Shelmet
shelmet.description: When attacked, it tightly shuts the lid of its shell. This reaction fails to protect it from Karrablast, however, because they can still get into the shell.

accelgor.name: Accelgor
accelgor.description: It moves with blinding speed and lobs poison at foes. Featuring Accelgor as a main character is a surefire way to make a movie or comic popular.

stunfisk.name: Stunfisk
stunfisk.description: Thanks to bacteria that lived in the mud flats with it, this Pokémon developed the organs it uses to generate electricity.

mienfoo.name: Mienfoo
mienfoo.description: In one minute, a well-trained Mienfoo can chop with its arms more than 100 times.

mienshao.name: Mienshao
mienshao.description: When Mienshao comes across a truly challenging opponent, it will lighten itself by biting off the fur on its arms.

druddigon.name: Druddigon
druddigon.description: Druddigon lives in caves, but it never skips sunbathing—it won’t be able to move if its body gets too cold.

golett.name: Golett
golett.description: They were sculpted from clay in ancient times. No one knows why, but some of them are driven to continually line up boulders.

golurk.name: Golurk
golurk.description: Artillery platforms built into the walls of ancient castles served as perches from which Golurk could fire energy beams.

golurkmega.name: Golurk-Mega
golurkmega.description: The energy within Golurk has been stimulated by Mega Evolution. The Pokémon could explode at any moment.

pawniard.name: Pawniard
pawniard.description: It uses river stones to maintain the cutting edges of the blades covering its body. These sharpened blades allow it to bring down opponents.

bisharp.name: Bisharp
bisharp.description: It’s accompanied by a large retinue of Pawniard. Bisharp keeps a keen eye on its minions, ensuring none of them even think of double-crossing it.

bouffalant.name: Bouffalant
bouffalant.description: These Pokémon can crush a car with no more than a headbutt. Bouffalant with more hair on their heads hold higher positions within the herd.

rufflet.name: Rufflet
rufflet.description: With its sharp claws, this Pokémon pierces its prey, and then it pecks at them. Although it also consumes berries, it’s a carnivore at heart.

braviary.name: Braviary
braviary.description: It’s thought that people disturbed their habitats in the past, so Braviary banded together to fight back.

vullaby.name: Vullaby
vullaby.description: It can’t fly yet and must wait until its wings have developed more. Since it’s still at a playful age, it hops around friskily.

mandibuzz.name: Mandibuzz
mandibuzz.description: It circles in the sky, keeping a keen eye out for Pokémon in a weakened state. Its choicest food is Cubone.

heatmor.name: Heatmor
heatmor.description: There’s a hole in its tail that allows it to draw in the air it needs to keep its fire burning. If the hole gets blocked, this Pokémon will fall ill.

durant.name: Durant
durant.description: They lay their eggs deep inside their nests. When attacked by Heatmor, they retaliate using their massive mandibles.

deino.name: Deino
deino.description: When it encounters something, its first urge is usually to bite it. If it likes what it tastes, it will commit the associated scent to memory.

zweilous.name: Zweilous
zweilous.description: While hunting for prey, Zweilous wanders its territory, its two heads often bickering over which way to go.

hydreigon.name: Hydreigon
hydreigon.description: There are a slew of stories about villages that were destroyed by Hydreigon. It bites anything that moves.

larvesta.name: Larvesta
larvesta.description: The people of ancient times believed that Larvesta fell from the sun.

volcarona.name: Volcarona
volcarona.description: Volcarona scatters burning scales. Some say it does this to start fires. Others say it’s trying to rescue those that suffer in the cold.

cobalion.name: Cobalion
cobalion.description: This Pokémon appears in a legend alongside Terrakion and Virizion, fighting against humans in defense of the Unova region’s Pokémon.

terrakion.name: Terrakion
terrakion.description: It has phenomenal power. It will mercilessly crush anyone or anything that bullies small Pokémon.

virizion.name: Virizion
virizion.description: A legend tells of this Pokémon working together with Cobalion and Terrakion to protect the Pokémon of the Unova region.

reshiram.name: Reshiram
reshiram.description: Flames spew from its tail as it flies through the sky like a jet airplane. It’s said that this Pokémon will scorch the world.

zekrom.name: Zekrom
zekrom.description: When the interior part of its tail spins like a motor, Zekrom can generate many bolts of lightning to blast its surroundings.

kyurem.name: Kyurem
kyurem.description: Dwelling within it is a power even greater than that of Reshiram or Zekrom, but the extreme cold keeps that power bound.

keldeo.name: Keldeo
keldeo.description: Cobalion, Terrakion, and Virizion taught this Pokémon how to fight. It dashes across the world, seeking more opportunities to further its training.

chesnaughtmega.name: Chesnaught-Mega
chesnaughtmega.description: It has fortified armor and a will to defend at all costs. Both are absurdly strong.

delphoxmega.name: Delphox-Mega
delphoxmega.description: It wields flaming branches to dazzle its opponents before incinerating them with a huge fireball.

greninjamega.name: Greninja-Mega
greninjamega.description: This Pokémon spins a giant shuriken at high speed to make it float, then clings to it upside down to catch opponents unawares.

bunnelby.name: Bunnelby
bunnelby.description: It excels at digging holes. Using its ears, it can dig a nest 33 feet deep in one night.

diggersby.name: Diggersby
diggersby.description: With power equal to an excavator, it can dig through dense bedrock. It’s a huge help during tunnel construction.

fletchling.name: Fletchling
fletchling.description: When it’s excited, its temperature can double, spiking hormone production in its body.

fletchinder.name: Fletchinder
fletchinder.description: It will not tolerate other Fletchinder entering its territory, which has a radius of several miles.

talonflame.name: Talonflame
talonflame.description: It zooms directly at its prey at flight speeds of close to 310 mph, while fiery embers scatter from gaps in its feathers.

pyroarmega.name: Pyroar-Mega
pyroarmega.description: This Pokémon spews flames hotter than 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit. It swings around its grand, blazing mane as it protects its allies.

floettemega.name: Floette-Mega
floettemega.description: The Eternal Flower has absorbed all the energy from Mega Evolution. The flower now attacks enemies on its own.

pancham.name: Pancham
pancham.description: There’s no point to the leaf in its mouth, aside from an effort to look cool. It’s mischievous, so it’s not well suited to inexperienced Trainers.

pangoro.name: Pangoro
pangoro.evoCondition: with a Dark-type in the party
pangoro.description: From the slight twitches of its bamboo leaf, it deduces its opponent’s movements. It’s eager to tussle but kindhearted toward its companions.

espurr.name: Espurr
espurr.description: Though Espurr’s expression never changes, behind that blank stare is an intense struggle to contain its devastating psychic power.

meowstic.name: Meowstic
meowstic.description: Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however.

meowsticmmega.name: Meowstic-M-Mega
meowsticmmega.description: Mega Meowstic can use its psychic power to compress or expand anything. It overwhelms foes by contorting space itself.

meowsticfmega.name: Meowstic-F-Mega
meowsticfmega.description: Mega Meowstic can use its psychic power to compress or expand anything. It overwhelms foes by contorting space itself.

honedge.name: Honedge
honedge.description: Honedge’s soul once belonged to a person who was killed a long time ago by the sword that makes up Honedge’s body.

doublade.name: Doublade
doublade.description: Honedge evolves into twins. The two blades rub together to emit a metallic sound that unnerves opponents.

aegislash.name: Aegislash
aegislash.description: In this defensive stance, Aegislash uses its steel body and a force field of spectral power to reduce the damage of any attack.

spritzee.name: Spritzee
spritzee.description: A scent pouch within this Pokémon’s body allows it to create various scents. A change in its diet will alter the fragrance it produces.

aromatisse.name: Aromatisse
aromatisse.description: The scent that constantly emits from its fur is so powerful that this Pokémon’s companions will eventually lose their sense of smell.

swirlix.name: Swirlix
swirlix.description: It eats its own weight in sugar every day. If it doesn’t get enough sugar, it becomes incredibly grumpy.

slurpuff.name: Slurpuff
slurpuff.description: By taking in a person’s scent, it can sniff out their mental and physical condition. It’s hoped that this skill will have many medical applications.

inkay.name: Inkay
inkay.description: It spins while making its luminescent spots flash. These spots allow it to communicate with others by using different patterns of light.

malamar.name: Malamar
malamar.description: Gazing at its luminescent spots will quickly induce a hypnotic state, putting the observer under Malamar’s control.

malamarmega.name: Malamar-Mega
malamarmega.description: It uses its colorful lights to overwrite the personalities and memories of others—and to control them.

binacle.name: Binacle
binacle.description: After two Binacle find a suitably sized rock, they adhere themselves to it and live together. They cooperate to gather food during high tide.

barbaracle.name: Barbaracle
barbaracle.description: Seven Binacle come together to form one Barbaracle. The Binacle that serves as the head gives orders to those serving as the limbs.

barbaraclemega.name: Barbaracle-Mega
barbaraclemega.description: It uses its many arms to toy with its opponents. This keeps the head extremely busy.

skrelp.name: Skrelp
skrelp.description: It drifts in the ocean, blending in with floating seaweed. When other Pokémon come to feast on the seaweed, Skrelp feasts on them instead.

dragalge.name: Dragalge
dragalge.description: Dragalge uses a poisonous liquid capable of corroding metal to send tankers that enter its territory to the bottom of the sea.

dragalgemega.name: Dragalge-Mega
dragalgemega.description: It spits a liquid that causes the regenerative power of cells to run wild. The liquid is deadly poison to everything other than itself.

clauncher.name: Clauncher
clauncher.description: Clauncher’s claws can fall off during battle, but they’ll regenerate. The meat inside the claws is popular as a delicacy in Galar.

clawitzer.name: Clawitzer
clawitzer.description: After using the feelers on its oversized claw to detect the location of prey, Clawitzer launches a cannonball of water at its target.

helioptile.name: Helioptile
helioptile.description: When spread, the frills on its head act like solar panels, generating the power behind this Pokémon’s electric moves.

heliolisk.name: Heliolisk
heliolisk.description: A now-vanished desert culture treasured these Pokémon. Appropriately, when Heliolisk came to the Galar region, treasure came with them.

tyrunt.name: Tyrunt
tyrunt.description: This is an ancient Pokémon, revived in modern times. It has a violent disposition, and it’ll tear apart anything it gets between its hefty jaws.

tyrantrum.name: Tyrantrum
tyrantrum.description: This Pokémon is from about 100,000,000 years ago. It has the presence of a king, vicious but magnificent.

amaura.name: Amaura
amaura.description: This Pokémon was successfully restored from a fossil. In the past, it lived with others of its kind in cold lands where there were fewer predators.

aurorus.name: Aurorus
aurorus.description: Aurorus was restored from a fossil. It’s said that when this Pokémon howls, auroras appear in the night sky.

sylveon.name: Sylveon
sylveon.evoCondition: with a Fairy-type move and two levels of Affection
sylveon.description: When this Pokémon sights its prey, it swirls its ribbonlike feelers as a distraction. A moment later, it pounces.

hawlucha.name: Hawlucha
hawlucha.description: It drives its opponents to exhaustion with its agile maneuvers, then ends the fight with a flashy finishing move.

hawluchamega.name: Hawlucha-Mega
hawluchamega.description: Mega Evolution has pumped up all its muscles. Hawlucha flexes to show off its strength.

dedenne.name: Dedenne
dedenne.description: A Dedenne’s whiskers pick up electrical waves other Dedenne send out. These Pokémon share locations of food or electricity with one another.

carbink.name: Carbink
carbink.description: Although this Pokémon is not especially rare, its glittering, jewel-draped body draws attention from people.

goomy.name: Goomy
goomy.description: Its source of protection is its slimy, germ-laden mucous membrane. Anyone who touches it needs some thorough hand-washing.

sliggoo.name: Sliggoo
sliggoo.description: This Pokémon’s mucous can dissolve anything. Toothless, it sprays mucous on its prey. Once they’re nicely dissolved, it slurps them up.

goodra.name: Goodra
goodra.description: It gets picked on because it’s meek. But then, whoever teased it gets to feel the full force of its horns and a good swatting from its thick tail.

klefki.name: Klefki
klefki.description: It inserts its horn into chinks in metal, absorbing metal ions. For some reason, it collects keys.

phantump.name: Phantump
phantump.description: According to legend, medicine to cure any illness can be made by plucking the green leaves on its head, brewing them, and boiling down the liquid.

trevenant.name: Trevenant
trevenant.description: Through its roots, it exerts control over other trees. A deadly curse falls upon anyone cutting down trees in forests where Trevenant dwell.

pumpkaboo.name: Pumpkaboo
pumpkaboo.description: Spirits that wander this world are placed into Pumpkaboo’s body. They’re then moved on to the afterlife.

gourgeist.name: Gourgeist
gourgeist.description: Eerie cries emanate from its body in the dead of night. The sounds are said to be the wails of spirits who are suffering in the afterlife.

bergmite.name: Bergmite
bergmite.description: They chill the air around them to −150 degrees Fahrenheit, freezing the water in the air into ice that they use as armor.

avalugg.name: Avalugg
avalugg.description: At high latitudes, this Pokémon can be found with clusters of Bergmite on its back as it swims among the icebergs.

noibat.name: Noibat
noibat.description: After nightfall, they emerge from the caves they nest in during the day. Using their ultrasonic waves, they go on the hunt for ripened fruit.

noivern.name: Noivern
noivern.description: Aggressive and cruel, this Pokémon will ruthlessly torment enemies that are helpless in the dark.

zygarde.name: Zygarde
zygarde.description: It’s thought to be monitoring the ecosystem. There are rumors that even greater power lies hidden within it.

zygardemega.name: Zygarde-Mega
zygardemega.description: In response to people's emotions during an unprecedented crisis, Zygarde Mega Evolves and calms the situation with its unmatched power.

dianciemega.name: Diancie-Mega
dianciemega.description: This Pokémon is also known as the Royal Pink Princess. The dazzling, sparkling diamond on its forehead is a whopping 2,000 carats.

rowlet.name: Rowlet
rowlet.description: Silently it glides, drawing near its targets. Before they even notice it, it begins to pelt them with vicious kicks.

dartrix.name: Dartrix
dartrix.description: It throws sharp feathers called blade quills at enemies or prey. It seldom misses.

decidueye.name: Decidueye
decidueye.description: Although basically cool and cautious, when it’s caught by surprise, it’s seized by panic.

litten.name: Litten
litten.description: It doesn’t allow its emotions to be easily seen. Earning its trust takes time. It prefers solitude.

torracat.name: Torracat
torracat.description: It boasts powerful front legs. With a single punch, it can bend an iron bar right over.

incineroar.name: Incineroar
incineroar.description: After hurling ferocious punches and flinging furious kicks, it finishes opponents off by spewing fire from around its navel.

popplio.name: Popplio
popplio.description: This Pokémon can control water bubbles. It practices diligently so it can learn to make big bubbles.

brionne.name: Brionne
brionne.description: It cares deeply for its companions. When its Trainer is feeling down, it performs a cheery dance to try and help.

primarina.name: Primarina
primarina.description: Its singing voice is its chief weapon in battle. This Pokémon’s Trainer must prioritize the daily maintenance of its throat at all costs.

pikipek.name: Pikipek
pikipek.description: This Pokémon feeds on berries, whose leftover seeds become the ammunition for the attacks it fires off from its mouth.

trumbeak.name: Trumbeak
trumbeak.description: By bending its beak, it can produce a variety of calls and brand itself a noisy nuisance for its neighbors.

toucannon.name: Toucannon
toucannon.description: Within its beak, its internal gas ignites, explosively launching seeds with enough power to pulverize boulders.

yungoos.name: Yungoos
yungoos.description: It wanders around in a never-ending search for food. At dusk, it collapses from exhaustion and falls asleep on the spot.

gumshoos.name: Gumshoos
gumshoos.description: It adores having Rattata and Raticate for dinner, but as it’s diurnal, it never encounters them. This Pokémon boasts incredible patience.

grubbin.name: Grubbin
grubbin.description: They often gather near places frequented by electric Pokémon in order to avoid being attacked by bird Pokémon.

charjabug.name: Charjabug
charjabug.description: From the food it digests, it generates electricity, and it stores this energy in its electric sac.

vikavolt.name: Vikavolt
vikavolt.description: It produces electricity via an electrical organ in its abdomen. It overwhelms bird Pokémon with shocking beams of electrical energy.

crabrawler.name: Crabrawler
crabrawler.description: It punches so much, its pincers often come off from overuse, but they grow back quickly. What little meat they contain is rich and delicious.

crabominable.name: Crabominable
crabominable.description: It just throws punches indiscriminately. In times of desperation, it can lop off its own pincers and fire them like rockets.

crabominablemega.name: Crabominable-Mega
crabominablemega.description: It can pulverize reinforced concrete with a light swing of one of its fists, each of which is covered in a thick layer of ice.

oricorio.name: Oricorio
oricorio.description: This Oricorio has sipped red nectar. Its passionate dance moves cause its enemies to combust in both body and mind.

cutiefly.name: Cutiefly
cutiefly.description: Myriads of Cutiefly flutter above the heads of people who have auras resembling those of flowers.

ribombee.name: Ribombee
ribombee.description: Some of Ribombee’s pollen puffs are highly nutritious. They are sometimes sold as supplements.

rockruff.name: Rockruff
rockruff.description: This Pokémon has lived with people since times long ago. It can sense when its Trainer is in the dumps and will stick close by its Trainer’s side.

lycanroc.name: Lycanroc
lycanroc.description: When properly raised from a young age, it will become a trustworthy partner that will absolutely never betray its Trainer.

lycanrocdusk.name: Lycanroc-Dusk
lycanrocdusk.evoCondition: from a special Rockruff during the evening

wishiwashi.name: Wishiwashi
wishiwashi.description: It’s awfully weak and notably tasty, so everyone is always out to get it. As it happens, anyone trying to bully it receives a painful lesson.

mareanie.name: Mareanie
mareanie.description: It’s found crawling on beaches and seafloors. The coral that grows on Corsola’s head is as good as a five-star banquet to this Pokémon.

toxapex.name: Toxapex
toxapex.description: Those attacked by Toxapex’s poison will suffer intense pain for three days and three nights. Post-recovery, there will be some aftereffects.

mudbray.name: Mudbray
mudbray.description: It has a stubborn, individualistic disposition. Eating dirt, making mud, and playing in the mire all form part of its daily routine.

mudsdale.name: Mudsdale
mudsdale.description: Its heavy, mud-covered kicks are its best means of attack, and it can reduce large trucks to scrap without breaking a sweat.

dewpider.name: Dewpider
dewpider.description: When it comes across enemies or potential prey, this Pokémon smashes its water-bubble-covered head into them.

araquanid.name: Araquanid
araquanid.description: Despite what its appearance suggests, it cares for others. If it finds vulnerable, weak Pokémon, it protectively brings them into its water bubble.

fomantis.name: Fomantis
fomantis.description: They give off a sweet and refreshing scent. Cutiefly often gather near the tall grass where Fomantis are hiding.

lurantis.name: Lurantis
lurantis.description: It fires beams from its sickle-shaped petals. These beams are powerful enough to cleave through thick metal plates.

morelull.name: Morelull
morelull.description: As it drowses the day away, it nourishes itself by sucking from tree roots. It wakens at the fall of night, wandering off in search of a new tree.

shiinotic.name: Shiinotic
shiinotic.description: It emits flickering spores that cause drowsiness. When its prey succumb to sleep, this Pokémon feeds on them by sucking in their energy.

salandit.name: Salandit
salandit.description: Volcanoes or dry, craggy places are its home. It emanates a sweet-smelling poisonous gas that attracts bug Pokémon, then attacks them.

salazzle.name: Salazzle
salazzle.description: Filled with pheromones, its poisonous gas can be diluted to use in the production of luscious perfumes.

stufful.name: Stufful
stufful.description: A touch from anyone except a known friend sends it into a surging frenzy. It’s an incredibly dangerous Pokémon.

bewear.name: Bewear
bewear.description: This Pokémon has the habit of hugging its companions. Many Trainers have left this world after their spines were squashed by its hug.

bounsweet.name: Bounsweet
bounsweet.description: Although it’s too sugary for human consumption, Bounsweet’s sweat can be watered down into a juice with just the right amount of sweetness.

steenee.name: Steenee
steenee.description: This Pokémon is always bouncing around energetically. Other Pokémon are attracted by its lively appearance and pleasant aroma.

tsareena.name: Tsareena
tsareena.description: A Pokémon known for the beauty of its well-shaped legs, it sometimes appears as a mascot in advertisements for beauty salons.

comfey.name: Comfey
comfey.description: Baths prepared with the flowers from its vine have a relaxing effect, so this Pokémon is a hit with many people.

oranguru.name: Oranguru
oranguru.description: Deep in the jungle, high in the lofty canopy, this Pokémon abides. On rare occasions, it shows up at the beach to match wits with Slowking.

passimian.name: Passimian
passimian.description: They battle with hard berries for weapons. Their techniques are passed from the boss to the group, generation upon generation.

wimpod.name: Wimpod
wimpod.description: Its habitat varies from beaches to seabeds. A natural scavenger, it will gleefully chow down on anything edible, no matter how rotten.

golisopod.name: Golisopod
golisopod.description: It battles skillfully with its six arms, but spends most of its time peacefully meditating in caves deep beneath the sea.

golisopodmega.name: Golisopod-Mega
golisopodmega.description: It uses four of its arms to fiercely assail its foes. Once they've been pushed to the brink of defeat, it finishes them off with the arms it kept hidden.

sandygast.name: Sandygast
sandygast.description: It takes control of anyone who puts a hand in its mouth. And so it adds to the accumulation of its sand-mound body.

palossand.name: Palossand
palossand.description: Buried beneath the castle are masses of dried-up bones from those whose vitality it has drained.

pyukumuku.name: Pyukumuku
pyukumuku.description: These Pokémon line the beaches. The sticky mucous that covers their bodies can be used to soothe sunburned skin. How convenient!

silvally.name: Silvally
silvally.description: Although its name was Type: Null at first, the boy who evolved it into this form gave it the name by which it is now known.

minior.name: Minior
minior.description: Strong impacts can knock it out of its shell. This Pokémon was born from mutated nanoparticles.

komala.name: Komala
komala.description: The log it holds was given to it by its parents at birth. It has also been known to cling to the arm of a friendly Trainer.

turtonator.name: Turtonator
turtonator.description: It gushes fire and poisonous gases from its nostrils. Its dung is an explosive substance and can be put to various uses.

togedemaru.name: Togedemaru
togedemaru.description: The long hairs on its back act as lightning rods. The bolts of lightning it attracts are stored as energy in its electric sac.

mimikyu.name: Mimikyu
mimikyu.description: A lonely Pokémon, it conceals its terrifying appearance beneath an old rag so it can get closer to people and other Pokémon.

bruxish.name: Bruxish
bruxish.description: It stuns its prey with psychokinesis and then grinds them to mush with its strong teeth. Even Shellder’s shell is no match for it.

drampa.name: Drampa
drampa.description: This Pokémon is friendly to people and loves children most of all. It comes from deep in the mountains to play with children it likes in town.

drampamega.name: Drampa-Mega
drampamega.description: Drampa's cells have been invigorated, allowing it to regain its youth. It manipulates the atmosphere to summon storms.

dhelmise.name: Dhelmise
dhelmise.description: The soul of seaweed adrift in the waves became reborn as this Pokémon. It maintains itself with new infusions of seabed detritus and seaweed.

jangmoo.name: Jangmo-o
jangmoo.description: They live in mountains where no trace of humans can be detected. Jangmo-o grow little by little as they battle one another.

hakamoo.name: Hakamo-o
hakamoo.description: It sheds and regrows its scales on a continuous basis. The scales become harder and sharper each time they’re regrown.

kommoo.name: Kommo-o
kommoo.description: Its rigid scales function as offense and defense. In the past, its scales were processed and used to make weapons and other commodities.

cosmog.name: Cosmog
cosmog.description: In ages past, it was called the child of the stars. It’s said to be a Pokémon from another world, but no specific details are known.

cosmoem.name: Cosmoem
cosmoem.description: There’s something accumulating around the black core within its hard shell. People think this Pokémon may come from another world.

solgaleo.name: Solgaleo
solgaleo.description: This Pokémon is said to be a male evolution of Cosmog. At the activation of its third eye, it departs for another world.

lunala.name: Lunala
lunala.description: Said to live in another world, this Pokémon devours light, drawing the moonless dark veil of night over the brightness of day.

nihilego.name: Nihilego
nihilego.description: One of the Ultra Beasts. It’s unclear whether or not this Pokémon is sentient, but sometimes it can be observed behaving like a young girl.

buzzwole.name: Buzzwole
buzzwole.description: A mysterious life-form called an Ultra Beast. Witnesses saw it pulverize a dump truck with a single punch.

pheromosa.name: Pheromosa
pheromosa.description: One of the Ultra Beasts. It refuses to touch anything, perhaps because it senses some uncleanness in this world.

xurkitree.name: Xurkitree
xurkitree.description: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. It raided a power plant, so people think it energizes itself with electricity.

celesteela.name: Celesteela
celesteela.description: One kind of Ultra Beast. Witnesses have seen it burn down a forest by expelling gas from its two arms.

kartana.name: Kartana
kartana.description: One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade.

guzzlord.name: Guzzlord
guzzlord.description: A dangerous Ultra Beast, it appears to be eating constantly, but for some reason its droppings have never been found.

necrozma.name: Necrozma
necrozma.description: Light is apparently the source of its energy. It has an extraordinarily vicious disposition and is constantly firing off laser beams.

magearna.name: Magearna
magearna.description: Its mechanized body is merely a vessel. Its true self is its Soul-Heart, an artificial soul.

magearnamega.name: Magearna-Mega
magearnamega.description: This is Magearna once a previously hidden mode activates. The emotions Magearna had begun to feel now hide away as it fells foe after foe.

magearnaoriginalmega.name: Magearna-Original-Mega
magearnaoriginalmega.description: A mechanism to remove Magearna's limitations has lain secretly within Magearna for 500 years. This mechanism is triggered by a Mega Stone.

marshadow.name: Marshadow
marshadow.description: It lurks in the shadows of others, copying their movements and powers. This Pokémon is craven and cowering.

zeraora.name: Zeraora
zeraora.description: It runs as fast as lightning strikes, shredding its opponents with its high-voltage claws.

zeraoramega.name: Zeraora-Mega
zeraoramega.description: It stores up 10 lightning strikes' worth of electricity. When it stops limiting itself, it's in the strongest class of electric Pokémon.

meltan.name: Meltan
meltan.description: It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy.

melmetal.name: Melmetal
melmetal.description: At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan.

melmetalgmax.name: Melmetal-Gmax
melmetalgmax.description: It can send electric beams streaking out from the hole in its belly. The beams' tremendous energy can vaporize an opponent in one shot

grookey.name: Grookey
grookey.description: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

thwackey.name: Thwackey
thwackey.description: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.

rillaboom.name: Rillaboom
rillaboom.description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.

rillaboomgmax.name: Rillaboom-Gmax
rillaboomgmax.description: Gigantamax energy has caused Rillaboom's stump to grow into a drum set that resembles a forest.

scorbunny.name: Scorbunny
scorbunny.description: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.

raboot.name: Raboot
raboot.description: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.

cinderace.name: Cinderace
cinderace.description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.

cinderacegmax.name: Cinderace-Gmax
cinderacegmax.description: Infused with Cinderace's fighting spirit, the gigantic Pyro Ball never misses its targets and completely roasts opponents.

sobble.name: Sobble
sobble.description: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.

drizzile.name: Drizzile
drizzile.description: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.

inteleon.name: Inteleon
inteleon.description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.

inteleongmax.name: Inteleon-Gmax
inteleongmax.description: Gigantamax Inteleon's Water Gun move fires at Mach 7. As the Pokémon takes aim, it uses the crest on its head to gauge wind and temperature.

skwovet.name: Skwovet
skwovet.description: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.

greedent.name: Greedent
greedent.description: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.

rookidee.name: Rookidee
rookidee.description: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.

corvisquire.name: Corvisquire
corvisquire.description: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.

corviknight.name: Corviknight
corviknight.description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.

corviknightgmax.name: Corviknight-Gmax
corviknightgmax.description: The eight feathers on its back are called blade birds, and they can launch off its body to attack foes independently.

blipbug.name: Blipbug
blipbug.description: A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.

dottler.name: Dottler
dottler.description: It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.

orbeetle.name: Orbeetle
orbeetle.description: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.

orbeetlegmax.name: Orbeetle-Gmax
orbeetlegmax.description: Its brain has grown to a gargantuan size, as has the rest of its body. This Pokémon's intellect and psychic abilities are overpowering.

nickit.name: Nickit
nickit.description: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.

thievul.name: Thievul
thievul.description: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.

gossifleur.name: Gossifleur
gossifleur.description: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.

eldegoss.name: Eldegoss
eldegoss.description: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.

wooloo.name: Wooloo
wooloo.description: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.

dubwool.name: Dubwool
dubwool.description: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.

chewtle.name: Chewtle
chewtle.description: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.

drednaw.name: Drednaw
drednaw.description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

drednawgmax.name: Drednaw-Gmax
drednawgmax.description: It responded to Gigantamax energy by becoming bipedal. First it comes crashing down on foes, and then it finishes them off with its massive jaws.

yamper.name: Yamper
yamper.description: This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail.

boltund.name: Boltund
boltund.description: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.

rolycoly.name: Rolycoly
rolycoly.description: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.

carkol.name: Carkol
carkol.description: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.

coalossal.name: Coalossal
coalossal.description: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.

coalossalgmax.name: Coalossal-Gmax
coalossalgmax.description: When Galar was hit by a harsh cold wave, this Pokémon served as a giant heating stove and saved many lives.

applin.name: Applin
applin.description: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.

flapple.name: Flapple
flapple.description: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.

flapplegmax.name: Flapple-Gmax
flapplegmax.description: If it stretches its neck, the strong aroma of its nectar pours out. The scent is so sickeningly sweet that one whiff makes other Pokémon faint.

appletun.name: Appletun
appletun.description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.

appletungmax.name: Appletun-Gmax
appletungmax.description: If it stretches its neck, the strong aroma of its nectar pours out. The scent is so sickeningly sweet that one whiff makes other Pokémon faint.

silicobra.name: Silicobra
silicobra.description: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.

sandaconda.name: Sandaconda
sandaconda.description: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.

sandacondagmax.name: Sandaconda-Gmax
sandacondagmax.description: Sand swirls around its body with such speed and power that it could pulverize a skyscraper.

cramorant.name: Cramorant
cramorant.description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.

arrokuda.name: Arrokuda
arrokuda.description: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw.

barraskewda.name: Barraskewda
barraskewda.description: This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.

toxel.name: Toxel
toxel.description: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.

toxtricity.name: Toxtricity
toxtricity.description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.

toxtricitygmax.name: Toxtricity-Gmax
toxtricitygmax.description: Out of control after its own poison penetrated its brain, it tears across the land in a rampage, contaminating the earth with toxic sweat.

toxtricitylowkeygmax.name: Toxtricity-Low-Key-Gmax
toxtricitylowkeygmax.description: Out of control after its own poison penetrated its brain, it tears across the land in a rampage, contaminating the earth with toxic sweat.

sizzlipede.name: Sizzlipede
sizzlipede.description: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.

centiskorch.name: Centiskorch
centiskorch.description: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.

centiskorchgmax.name: Centiskorch-Gmax
centiskorchgmax.description: Gigantamax energy has evoked a rise in its body temperature, now reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. Its heat waves incinerate its enemies.

clobbopus.name: Clobbopus
clobbopus.description: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.

grapploct.name: Grapploct
grapploct.description: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

sinistea.name: Sinistea
sinistea.description: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

polteageist.name: Polteageist
polteageist.description: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

hatenna.name: Hatenna
hatenna.description: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.

hattrem.name: Hattrem
hattrem.description: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.

hatterene.name: Hatterene
hatterene.description: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.

hatterenegmax.name: Hatterene-Gmax
hatterenegmax.description: This Pokémon can read the emotions of creatures over 30 miles away. The minute it senses hostility, it goes on the attack.

impidimp.name: Impidimp
impidimp.description: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.

morgrem.name: Morgrem
morgrem.description: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.

grimmsnarl.name: Grimmsnarl
grimmsnarl.description: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.

grimmsnarlgmax.name: Grimmsnarl-Gmax
grimmsnarlgmax.description: Gigantamax energy has caused more hair to sprout all over its body. With the added strength, it can jump over the world's tallest building.

obstagoon.name: Obstagoon
obstagoon.description: Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct.

perrserker.name: Perrserker
perrserker.description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

cursola.name: Cursola
cursola.description: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit.

runerigus.name: Runerigus
runerigus.evoCondition: Have 49+ HP lost and walk under stone sculpture in Dusty Bowl
runerigus.description: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.

milcery.name: Milcery
milcery.description: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

alcremie.name: Alcremie
alcremie.description: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.

alcremiegmax.name: Alcremie-Gmax
alcremiegmax.description: It launches swarms of missiles, each made of cream and loaded with 100,000 kilocalories. Get hit by one of these, and your head will swim.

falinks.name: Falinks
falinks.description: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.

falinksmega.name: Falinks-Mega
falinksmega.description: Mega Falinks has taken on the ultimate battle formation, which can be achieved only if the troopers and brass have the strongest of bonds.

pincurchin.name: Pincurchin
pincurchin.description: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

snom.name: Snom
snom.description: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.

frosmoth.name: Frosmoth
frosmoth.description: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.

stonjourner.name: Stonjourner
stonjourner.description: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

eiscue.name: Eiscue
eiscue.description: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.

indeedee.name: Indeedee
indeedee.description: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.

morpeko.name: Morpeko
morpeko.description: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.

cufant.name: Cufant
cufant.description: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

copperajah.name: Copperajah
copperajah.description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.

copperajahgmax.name: Copperajah-Gmax
copperajahgmax.description: So much power is packed within its trunk that if it were to unleash that power, the resulting blast could level mountains and change the landscape.

dracozolt.name: Dracozolt
dracozolt.description: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.

arctozolt.name: Arctozolt
arctozolt.description: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.

dracovish.name: Dracovish
dracovish.description: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.

arctovish.name: Arctovish
arctovish.description: Though it’s able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.

duraludon.name: Duraludon
duraludon.description: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

duraludongmax.name: Duraludon-Gmax
duraludongmax.description: The hardness of its cells is exceptional, even among Steel types. It also has a body structure that's resistant to earthquakes.

dreepy.name: Dreepy
dreepy.description: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.

drakloak.name: Drakloak
drakloak.description: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.

dragapult.name: Dragapult
dragapult.description: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

zacian.name: Zacian
zacian.description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.

zamazenta.name: Zamazenta
zamazenta.description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.

eternatus.name: Eternatus
eternatus.description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

kubfu.name: Kubfu
kubfu.description: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

urshifu.name: Urshifu
urshifu.description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.

urshifugmax.name: Urshifu-Gmax
urshifugmax.description: The energy released by this Pokémon's fists forms shock waves that can blow away Dynamax Pokémon in just one hit.

urshifurapidstrikegmax.name: Urshifu-Rapid-Strike-Gmax
urshifurapidstrikegmax.description: All it takes is a glare from this Pokémon to take the lives of those with evil in their hearts—or so they say.

zarude.name: Zarude
zarude.description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.

regieleki.name: Regieleki
regieleki.description: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power.

regidrago.name: Regidrago
regidrago.description: An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven.

glastrier.name: Glastrier
glastrier.description: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force.

spectrier.name: Spectrier
spectrier.description: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body.

calyrex.name: Calyrex
calyrex.description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

wyrdeer.name: Wyrdeer
wyrdeer.evoCondition: Use Agile style Psyshield Bash 20 times

ursaluna.name: Ursaluna
ursaluna.evoCondition: Peat Block when there's a full moon

overqwil.name: Overqwil
overqwil.evoCondition: Use Strong style Barb Barrage 20 times

sprigatito.name: Sprigatito
sprigatito.description: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

floragato.name: Floragato
floragato.description: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

meowscarada.name: Meowscarada
meowscarada.description: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

fuecoco.name: Fuecoco
fuecoco.description: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.

crocalor.name: Crocalor
crocalor.description: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.

skeledirge.name: Skeledirge
skeledirge.description: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.

quaxly.name: Quaxly
quaxly.description: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime."

quaxwell.name: Quaxwell
quaxwell.description: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.

quaquaval.name: Quaquaval
quaquaval.description: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.

lechonk.name: Lechonk
lechonk.description: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.

oinkologne.name: Oinkologne
oinkologne.description: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.

tarountula.name: Tarountula
tarountula.description: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.

spidops.name: Spidops
spidops.description: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.

nymble.name: Nymble
nymble.description: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

lokix.name: Lokix
lokix.description: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.

pawmi.name: Pawmi
pawmi.description: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

pawmo.name: Pawmo
pawmo.description: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

pawmot.name: Pawmot
pawmot.description: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

tandemaus.name: Tandemaus
tandemaus.description: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

maushold.name: Maushold
maushold.description: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.

fidough.name: Fidough
fidough.description: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity.

dachsbun.name: Dachsbun
dachsbun.description: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

smoliv.name: Smoliv
smoliv.description: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

dolliv.name: Dolliv
dolliv.description: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

arboliva.name: Arboliva
arboliva.description: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

squawkabilly.name: Squawkabilly
squawkabilly.description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.

nacli.name: Nacli
nacli.description: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.

naclstack.name: Naclstack
naclstack.description: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.

garganacl.name: Garganacl
garganacl.description: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.

charcadet.name: Charcadet
charcadet.description: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

armarouge.name: Armarouge
armarouge.description: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

ceruledge.name: Ceruledge
ceruledge.description: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

tadbulb.name: Tadbulb
tadbulb.description: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

bellibolt.name: Bellibolt
bellibolt.description: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.

wattrel.name: Wattrel
wattrel.description: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.

kilowattrel.name: Kilowattrel
kilowattrel.description: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

maschiff.name: Maschiff
maschiff.description: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face.

mabosstiff.name: Mabosstiff
mabosstiff.description: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.

shroodle.name: Shroodle
shroodle.description: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

grafaiai.name: Grafaiai
grafaiai.description: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

bramblin.name: Bramblin
bramblin.description: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.

brambleghast.name: Brambleghast
brambleghast.description: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.

toedscool.name: Toedscool
toedscool.description: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

toedscruel.name: Toedscruel
toedscruel.description: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

klawf.name: Klawf
klawf.description: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.

capsakid.name: Capsakid
capsakid.description: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

scovillain.name: Scovillain
scovillain.description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

scovillainmega.name: Scovillain-Mega
scovillainmega.description: Mega Evolution has dialed up this Pokémon's spiciness. It swings its "necktie" around to wallop its foes.

rellor.name: Rellor
rellor.description: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.

rabsca.name: Rabsca
rabsca.description: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.

flittle.name: Flittle
flittle.description: Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly.

espathra.name: Espathra
espathra.description: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.

tinkatink.name: Tinkatink
tinkatink.description: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

tinkatuff.name: Tinkatuff
tinkatuff.description: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

tinkaton.name: Tinkaton
tinkaton.description: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

wiglett.name: Wiglett
wiglett.description: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

wugtrio.name: Wugtrio
wugtrio.description: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

bombirdier.name: Bombirdier
bombirdier.description: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.

finizen.name: Finizen
finizen.description: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

palafin.name: Palafin
palafin.description: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.

varoom.name: Varoom
varoom.description: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

revavroom.name: Revavroom
revavroom.description: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.

cyclizar.name: Cyclizar
cyclizar.description: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

orthworm.name: Orthworm
orthworm.description: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.

glimmet.name: Glimmet
glimmet.description: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

glimmora.name: Glimmora
glimmora.description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

glimmoramega.name: Glimmora-Mega
glimmoramega.description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

greavard.name: Greavard
greavard.description: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

houndstone.name: Houndstone
houndstone.description: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

flamigo.name: Flamigo
flamigo.description: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

cetoddle.name: Cetoddle
cetoddle.description: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.

cetitan.name: Cetitan
cetitan.description: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.

veluza.name: Veluza
veluza.description: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.

dondozo.name: Dondozo
dondozo.description: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

tatsugiri.name: Tatsugiri
tatsugiri.description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

tatsugiricurlymega.name: Tatsugiri-Curly-Mega
tatsugiricurlymega.description: Tatsugiri's brain has been invigorated by Mega Evolution, making it even wilier. It can create and command copies of itself.

tatsugiridroopymega.name: Tatsugiri-Droopy-Mega
tatsugiridroopymega.description: Baxcalibur's dorsal blade has grown even more massive thanks to Mega Evolution. This Pokémon fires beams from the hilt at its solar plexus.

annihilape.name: Annihilape
annihilape.evoCondition: Use Rage Fist 20 times and level-up
annihilape.description: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.

clodsire.name: Clodsire
clodsire.description: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.

farigiraf.name: Farigiraf
farigiraf.description: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s.

dudunsparce.name: Dudunsparce
dudunsparce.description: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.

kingambit.name: Kingambit
kingambit.evoCondition: Defeat 3 Bisharp leading Pawniard and level-up
kingambit.description: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

frigibax.name: Frigibax
frigibax.description: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.

arctibax.name: Arctibax
arctibax.description: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

baxcalibur.name: Baxcalibur
baxcalibur.description: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

baxcaliburmega.name: Baxcalibur-Mega
baxcaliburmega.description: Baxcalibur's dorsal blade has grown even more massive thanks to Mega Evolution. This Pokémon fires beams from the hilt at its solar plexus.

gimmighoul.name: Gimmighoul
gimmighoul.description: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.

gholdengo.name: Gholdengo
gholdengo.evoCondition: Level up with 999 Coins in the bag
gholdengo.description: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

wochien.name: Wo-Chien
wochien.description: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king’s evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.

chienpao.name: Chien-Pao
chienpao.description: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.

tinglu.name: Ting-Lu
tinglu.description: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.

chiyu.name: Chi-Yu
chiyu.description: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.

koraidon.name: Koraidon
koraidon.description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.

miraidon.name: Miraidon
miraidon.description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.

dipplin.name: Dipplin
dipplin.description: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.

poltchageist.name: Poltchageist
poltchageist.description: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.

sinistcha.name: Sinistcha
sinistcha.description: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.

okidogi.name: Okidogi
okidogi.description: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.

munkidori.name: Munkidori
munkidori.description: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.

fezandipiti.name: Fezandipiti
fezandipiti.description: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.

ogerpon.name: Ogerpon
ogerpon.description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.

archaludon.name: Archaludon
archaludon.description: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.

hydrapple.name: Hydrapple
hydrapple.description: Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander.

terapagos.name: Terapagos
terapagos.description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.

pecharunt.name: Pecharunt
pecharunt.description: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
